  About the Game The three time IGF award nominated 1000xRESIST is a thrilling sci-fi adventure. 1000 years in the future, humanity is all but extinguished and a disease spread by an alien occupation keeps the survivors underground. You are Watcher. You dutifully fulfil your purpose in service of the ALLMOTHER, until the day you learn a shocking secret that changes everything.
 
  
  
 
 In the near future we learn we are not alone in the universe. A mysterious alien race of giant entities arrives. We call them the Occupants.
 
 They are not hostile, but it doesn’t matter. Their arrival is a death sentence. Humanity is wiped out in a matter of months, succumbing to a disease the Occupants have brought to our planet.
 
 There is one survivor, a teenage girl called Iris. Somehow she is immune. 
 
  
  
 
 1000 years later. Iris is not only immune but immortal. She has birthed a new society consisting exclusively of her own clones. 
 
 She calls them Sisters. They call her the ALLMOTHER.
 
 Unlike the ALLMOTHER, the sisters are not immune. They must wear masks 24/7 to avoid breathing the diseased air even in the Orchard - an underground bunker where they live in constant fear of an Occupant attack.
 
 The ALLMOTHER lives in her own compound on the front line of the war with the Occupants. All Sisters dream of one day being able to take the train and join her in the fight.
 
  
 Within the Orchard, every sister has an assigned function, while six sisters have special roles to play…
 
  
 
   Principal - Head of administration and oversight of the Orchard
   Bang Bang Fire - Head of military
   Knower - Head of knowledge preservation
   Fixer - Head of engineering
   Healer - Head of medical and cloning  
 And you - the new  Watcher .
 
 Your role is unique. You have the great privilege of reliving and interpreting the memories of the ALLMOTHER through a process known as Communion, made possible by Secretary, your floating AI companion.
 
  
 
 As the game begins, you are excited to embark on your first Communion.
 
  
 But all is not well.
 
 Your closest sister, Fixer, comes to you with a dangerous revelation. You have been lied to. The ALLMOTHER is not what she claims to be.
 
 Fixer’s claims rock the foundations of your world, throwing everything you know and believe into doubt.
 
 After Fixer is executed for her treason, it falls to you to discover the truth.
 
  
 
  
 Dive into the memories of the ALLMOTHER.
 
 Explore pivotal moments in her life from high school days and the arrival of the Occupants to the creation of the Orchard and the birth of the first sisters.
 
 Jump back and forth through moments in time within these memories to solve puzzles and access locked off areas and secrets.
 
  
 
 In between Communions, explore the Orchard - a large underground hub area which houses you and your sisters, has many characters to speak to, and holds many things to uncover.
 
 Find the truth and reclaim your legacy.

We are a group of majority Asian-Canadian diaspora creators with a decade of experience in dance, theatre, music, film, visual arts, and new media arts, bringing our background in the experimental performing arts to interactive media.

game.brief:
Buzz   "1000xRESIST nails what it's going for—a blend of "big idea" sci-fi and coming-of-age story." 
 -  PC Gamer 
 
  "At its heights, it achieves the cerebral complexity I expect from the likes of Hideo Kojima or Yoko Taro..." 
 -  PC GamesN 
 
  "It’s a lucid dream, hand crafted for you. It’s extraordinary. It’s something really very special. In a world plagued by extruded content emanating vacuously from every screen, we should be so lucky." 
 -  Giant Bomb 
 
  STAY INFORMED        
 Sign up to our Fellow Traveller community to hear more about 1000xRESIST, and exclusive announcements, behind the scenes sneak peaks, competitions and more from all our story-rich games!
 
  About the Game  
 The three time IGF award nominated 1000xRESIST is a thrilling sci-fi adventure. 1000 years in the future, humanity is all but extinguished and a disease spread by an alien occupation keeps the survivors underground. You are Watcher. You dutifully fulfil your purpose in service of the ALLMOTHER, until the day you learn a shocking secret that changes everything.
 
  
  
 
 In the near future we learn we are not alone in the universe. A mysterious alien race of giant entities arrives. We call them the Occupants.
 
 They are not hostile, but it doesn’t matter. Their arrival is a death sentence. Humanity is wiped out in a matter of months, succumbing to a disease the Occupants have brought to our planet.
 
 There is one survivor, a teenage girl called Iris. Somehow she is immune. 
 
  
  
 
 1000 years later. Iris is not only immune but immortal. She has birthed a new society consisting exclusively of her own clones. 
 
 She calls them Sisters. They call her the ALLMOTHER.
 
 Unlike the ALLMOTHER, the sisters are not immune. They must wear masks 24/7 to avoid breathing the diseased air even in the Orchard - an underground bunker where they live in constant fear of an Occupant attack.
 
 The ALLMOTHER lives in her own compound on the front line of the war with the Occupants. All Sisters dream of one day being able to take the train and join her in the fight.
 
  
 Within the Orchard, every sister has an assigned function, while six sisters have special roles to play…
 
  
 
   Principal - Head of administration and oversight of the Orchard
   Bang Bang Fire - Head of military
   Knower - Head of knowledge preservation
   Fixer - Head of engineering
   Healer - Head of medical and cloning  
 And you - the new  Watcher .
 
 Your role is unique. You have the great privilege of reliving and interpreting the memories of the ALLMOTHER through a process known as Communion, made possible by Secretary, your floating AI companion.
 
  
 
 As the game begins, you are excited to embark on your first Communion.
 
  
 But all is not well.
 
 Your closest sister, Fixer, comes to you with a dangerous revelation. You have been lied to. The ALLMOTHER is not what she claims to be.
 
 Fixer’s claims rock the foundations of your world, throwing everything you know and believe into doubt.
 
 After Fixer is executed for her treason, it falls to you to discover the truth.
 
  
 
  
 Dive into the memories of the ALLMOTHER.
 
 Explore pivotal moments in her life from high school days and the arrival of the Occupants to the creation of the Orchard and the birth of the first sisters.
 
 Jump back and forth through moments in time within these memories to solve puzzles and access locked off areas and secrets.
 
  
 
 In between Communions, explore the Orchard - a large underground hub area which houses you and your sisters, has many characters to speak to, and holds many things to uncover.
 
 Find the truth and reclaim your legacy.
 
  
 Experience perspective shifts both literal and metaphorical as the game blends between 3rd person adventure, visual novel and first person walking simulator while throwing twists, turns and revelations at you until you question everything you think you know.
 
  
 
 Born from an eclectic set of inspirations, including the games of Yoko Taro (NieR:Automata), the anime of Satoshi Kon (Perfect Blue) and Naoko Yamada (A Silent Voice), and even the theatre of Robert Wilson (Einstein on the Beach), 1000xRESIST tells a story in ways only a game can while simultaneously bringing fresh ideas to interactive storytelling from theatre, dance, performance art, and cinema.
 
  
 Enjoy more than 10 hours of playtime brought to life with over 15,000 lines of fully voiced dialogue from a brilliant cast of Asian-Canadian actors and an incredible soundtrack from two composers.
 
  https://store.steampowered.com/app/1675830/1000xRESIST/  ABOUT THE DEVELOPER 
  
 
 1000xRESIST is created by sunset visitor 斜陽過客, an independent studio based in Vancouver (Canada) dedicated to telling diverse stories through the lens of speculative fiction. We are a group of majority Asian-Canadian diaspora creators with a decade of experience in dance, theatre, music, film, visual arts, and new media arts, bringing our background in the experimental performing arts to interactive media.

game.title: Mario Kart: Double Dash!!
game.description: The Mushroom Kingdom just got a whole lot more hectic as Mario and friends double up for furious kart racing. This time around, each kart holds two racers that can switch places at any time, so choose from a huge cast of favorites and pair them up any way you see fit. The character in front handles the driving duties, while the character in the rear doles out damage with six normal items and eight special items that only specific characters can use. Get ready for some intense multiplayer mayhem with your favorite characters, including Mario, Luigi, Donkey Kong, Peach, Bowser, and Koopa.

game.title: Evoland Legendary Edition
game.description:
Evoland is a journey through the history of action/adventure gaming, allowing you to unlock new technologies, gameplay systems and graphic upgrades as you progress through the game. 
 
  
 Inspired by many cult series that have left their mark in the RPG video gaming culture, Evoland takes you from monochrome to full 3D graphics and from active time battles to real time boss fights, all with plenty of humor and references to many classic games.
 
  
 Evoland 2 graphics style is changing as you travel through time and its gameplay evolves as you move along the storyline. It is also a real RPG at heart, with a deep scenario based on time travel: explore different eras and change the history of the world. But are you sure that the consequences will not make things worse?
 
 Full of humor and references to classic games, the Evoland series brings a truly epic and extraordinary adventure, unlike anything you’ve ever played before!

Evoland est un voyage à travers l'histoire des jeux d'action/aventure, au cours duquel vous pourrez débloquer de nouveaux systèmes de gameplay, technologies et améliorations graphiques en progressant dans le jeu. 
 
  
 Inspiré par de nombreuses licences cultes qui ont marqué l'histoire des jeux de rôle, Evoland vous fera voyager, des graphismes monochromes à la 3D, et des batailles au tour par tour aux combats de boss en temps réel, le tout avec une bonne dose d'humour et de références à des jeux emblématiques.
 
  
 Le style graphique d'Evoland 2 change tandis que vous voyagez dans le temps, et son gameplay évolue au fil de l'aventure. Il s'agit d'un véritable jeu de rôle, doté d'un scénario profond basé sur les voyages dans le temps : vous serez amené à traverser différentes époques et même à changer le cours de l'histoire du monde. Mais comment s'assurer que les conséquences de vos actes ne rendront pas les choses encore pires qu'avant ?
 
 Pleine d'humour et de références à des jeux emblématiques, la série des Evoland propose une aventure épique et extraordinaire, qui se démarque clairement de tous les jeux que vous connaissez.

Evoland ist eine Reise durch die Geschichte des Action-/Abenteuerspiels, bei der du im weiteren Verlauf neue Technologien, Spielsysteme und Grafik-Upgrades freischalten kannst. 
 
  
 Inspiriert von vielen Kult-Serien, die ihre Spuren in der RPG-Videospielkultur hinterlassen haben, führt dich Evoland von monochromer bis hin zu voller 3D-Grafik und von aktiven Zeitkämpfen bis hin zu Echtzeit-Bosskämpfen, und das alles gepaart mit viel Humor und Referenzen zu vielen klassischen Spiele.
 
  
 Der Grafikstil von Evoland 2 ändert sich beim Reisen durch die Zeit und sein Gameplay entwickelt sich, während du in der Story voranschreitest. Im Kern ist das Spiel trotzdem ein echtes RPG, mit einem tiefgründigen Szenario, das auf Zeitreisen basiert: Erkunde verschiedene Epochen und verändere die Geschichte der Welt. Aber kannst du dir sicher sein, dass die Folgen deiner Handlungen nicht alles nur viel schlimmer machen?
 
 Voller Humor und Referenzen zu klassischen Spielen, bietet die Evoland-Serie ein wahrhaft episches und außergewöhnliches Abenteuer, das du so noch nie zuvor erlebt hast.

game.title: The Witcher
game.description:
Based on the novel series by Andrzej Sapkowski, The Witcher follows Geralt of Rivia, an amnesiac witcher (problem solver and slayer of monsters) whose home, the Kaer Morhen citadel, is besieged by an organization called the Salamandra, who steal their valuable potions and get away. Throughout the game, Geralt must resolve people's moral dilemmas, connect the dots of his past and track down the Salamandra.

The game begins when Geralt of Rivia, one of a few remaining "witchers" – traveling monster hunters for hire, gifted with unnatural powers, is transported to the witcher stronghold of Kaer Morhen by fellow witchers who had discovered him unconscious in a field. Geralt remembers almost nothing of his life before that point. He is taken to Kaer Morhen, the base of the witchers, where he meets a sorceress named Triss Merigold. The castle is attacked by a gang of bandits named Salamandra, led by a criminal known as the Professor, a mage named Savolla who controls a large, praying mantis-like monster, and another mage named Azar Javed. The witchers and the sorceress manage to slay the monster and kill Savolla, but the Professor and Azar manage to escape with the mutagens that genetically alter the witchers. After curing Triss of the wounds she received while fighting Javed, Geralt and the rest of the witchers head off in different directions in order to find information on Salamandra.

localized_description.text:
Based on the novel series by Andrzej Sapkowski, The Witcher follows Geralt of Rivia, an amnesiac witcher (problem solver and slayer of monsters) whose home, the Kaer Morhen citadel, is besieged by an organization called the Salamandra, who steal their valuable potions and get away. Throughout the game, Geralt must resolve people's moral dilemmas, connect the dots of his past and track down the Salamandra.

The game begins when Geralt of Rivia, one of a few remaining "witchers" – traveling monster hunters for hire, gifted with unnatural powers, is transported to the witcher stronghold of Kaer Morhen by fellow witchers who had discovered him unconscious in a field. Geralt remembers almost nothing of his life before that point. He is taken to Kaer Morhen, the base of the witchers, where he meets a sorceress named Triss Merigold. The castle is attacked by a gang of bandits named Salamandra, led by a criminal known as the Professor, a mage named Savolla who controls a large, praying mantis-like monster, and another mage named Azar Javed. The witchers and the sorceress manage to slay the monster and kill Savolla, but the Professor and Azar manage to escape with the mutagens that genetically alter the witchers. After curing Triss of the wounds she received while fighting Javed, Geralt and the rest of the witchers head off in different directions in order to find information on Salamandra.

Check out other games from CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Check out other games from CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  About the Game The Witcher is a role-playing game set in a dark fantasy world where moral ambiguity reigns. Shattering the line between good and evil, the game emphasizes story and character development, while incorporating a tactically-deep, real-time combat system.
 
 Become The Witcher, Geralt of Rivia, and get caught in a web of intrigue woven by forces vying for control of the world. Make difficult decisions and live with the consequences in a game that will immerse you in an extraordinary tale like no other.
 
        KEY FEATURES  GERALT OF RIVIA: A ONE-OF-A-KIND PROTAGONIST 
   Take on the role of Geralt of Rivia: a charismatic swordmaster and professional monster slayer.
   Choose from over 250 special abilities, combat skills and magical powers to build a character best suited to your style of play.        
 
  ORIGINAL FANTASY WORLD DRAWN FROM LITERATURE 
   Enter a harsh fantasy world inspired by the writings of renowned Polish author Andrzej Sapkowski, where nothing is truly black or white, right or wrong.  
  NON-LINEAR STORYLINE 
   Immerse yourself in an epic narrative full of turns, twists and ambiguous moral decisions which have real impact on the storyline.
   Accomplish quests in a variety of ways and see how the narrative culminates in one of three different endings depending on your actions.  
  STUNNING TACTICAL ACTION 
   Engage in elaborate, yet intuitive real-time combat based on real medieval sword-fighting techniques.
   Battle using six combat styles, dozens of potions, complex alchemy system, modifiable weapons and powerful magic which all add tactical depth to the fluid real-time experience.
   Motion capture performed by medieval fighting experts at Frankfurt's renowned Metric Minds studio, resulting in 600 spectacular and authentic in-game combat animations.         ABOUT THE WITCHER: ENHANCED EDITION The Witcher: Enhanced Edition takes all of the acclaimed gameplay that garnered the original game more than 90 industry awards and introduces a number of gameplay and technical improvements.
    Superior dialogue and cutscenes:  Over 5000 rewritten and re-recorded lines of dialogue in English, completely redone German language version, as well as over 200 new gesture animations create a more consistent experience and make characters behave more believably in dialogue and cutscenes.
    Enhanced inventory:  A separate sack for alchemy ingredients, as well as a simple sort-and-stack function streamline item organization and usage.
    Technical improvements:  Numerous technical enhancements feature greatly reduced loading times, improved stability, combat responsiveness, faster inventory loading, an option to turn auto-saving on or off, and more.
    Character differentiation system:  The system randomizes the appearance of dozens of in-game models in order to add more variety to monsters and NPCs.  
 The Witcher Enhanced Edition comes with these bonus items:
   An interactive comic book
   D'jinni Adventure Editor
   Two new adventures offering 5+ hours of gameplay
   Official Soundtrack
   “Music Inspired by The Witcher” album
   “Making of” videos
   Official Game Guide
   Two maps of The Witcher's world

Descubre otros juegos de CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Descubre otros juegos de CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Acerca del juego The Witcher es un juego de rol ambientado en un siniestro mundo de fantasía donde reina la ambigüedad moral. Desdibujando la línea entre el bien y el mal, el juego hace énfasis en la historia y el desarrollo de los personajes, al tiempo que incorpora un sistema de combate a tiempo real de gran profundidad táctica.
 
 Ponte en la piel del brujo Geralt de Rivia y déjate atrapar por una red de intrigas urdidas por fuerzas que rivalizan por controlar el mundo. Toma decisiones difíciles y asume sus consecuencias en un juego que te sumergirá en una historia extraordinaria e incomparable.
 
        CARACTERÍSTICAS PRINCIPALES  GERALT DE RIVIA: UN PROTAGONISTA ÚNICO 
   Asume el papel de Geralt de Rivia, un carismático espadachín y cazador de monstruos profesional.
   Elige entre más de 250 habilidades especiales y de combate y poderes mágicos para desarrollar el personaje que mejor se adapte a tu estilo de juego.        
 
  MUNDO DE FANTASÍA ORIGINAL INSPIRADO EN LA LITERATURA 
   Adéntrate en un mundo hostil de fantasía inspirado en las obras del célebre escritor polaco Andrzej Sapkowski, en las cuales nada es blanco o negro, correcto o incorrecto.  
  TRAMA NO LINEAL 
   Sumérgete en una narrativa épica repleta de giros dramáticos y decisiones de ambigüedad moral que tienen un efecto real sobre la trama.
   Completa misiones de diversas maneras y observa cómo la historia culmina en tres finales distintos, dependiendo de tus acciones.  
  ACCIÓN TÁCTICA ASOMBROSA 
   Entabla combates tan complejos como intuitivos, en tiempo real, basados en auténticas técnicas de esgrima medievales.
   Lánzate a la batalla usando seis estilos de combate, decenas de pociones, un complejo sistema de alquimia, armas modificables y magia poderosa, lo que añade una capa de profundidad táctica a la fluida experiencia en tiempo real.
   Captura de movimientos llevada a cabo por expertos en lucha medieval en el renombrado estudio Metric Minds de Fráncfort, dando como resultado 600 animaciones de combate espectaculares y auténticas.         ACERCA DE THE WITCHER: ENHANCED EDITION The Witcher: Enhanced Edition incorpora toda la jugabilidad del aclamado juego original que obtuvo más de 90 premios de la industria y añade diversas mejoras de juego y técnicas.
    Diálogos y secuencias de vídeo mejoradas:  más de 5000 líneas de diálogo reescritas y regrabadas en inglés, una versión en alemán totalmente remozada, así como más de 200 nuevas animaciones de gestos que crean una experiencia más consistente y consiguen que los personajes se comporten de manera más creíble en los diálogos y las secuencias de vídeo.
    Inventario mejorado:  una bolsa aparte para los ingredientes alquímicos, así como una sencilla función de ordenar y apilar que optimiza la organización y utilización de objetos.
    Mejoras técnicas:  numerosas mejoras técnicas entre las que se incluyen tiempos de carga reducidos, estabilidad y capacidad de respuesta en combate mejoradas, carga de inventario más rápida, una opción para activar o desactivar el autoguardado y muchas más.
    Sistema de diferenciación de personajes:  el sistema aleatoriza el aspecto de decenas de modelos del juego para añadir más variedad a los monstruos y PNJ.  
 The Witcher Enhanced Edition incluye los siguientes artículos adicionales:
   Un cómic interactivo
   Editor de aventuras D'jinni
   Dos nuevas aventuras que suman más de 5 horas de juego
   Banda sonora oficial
   El álbum «Música inspirada en The Witcher»
   Vídeos del «making of»
   Guía oficial del juego
   Dos mapas del mundo de The Witcher

Découvrez d'autres jeux de CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Découvrez d'autres jeux de CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  À propos du jeu The Witcher est un jeu de rôles dans un monde sombre et fantastique où règne l'ambiguïté morale. Dépassant le clivage entre le bien et le mal, le jeu met l'accent sur l'histoire et le développement des personnages, tout en proposant un système de combat en temps réel d'un grande richesse tactique.
 
 Incarnez le sorceleur Geralt de Riv et laissez-vous happer dans une mystérieuse toile tissée par les forces luttant pour contrôler le monde. Prenez des décisions difficiles et assumez leurs conséquences dans un jeu qui vous plongera dans une aventure exceptionnelle.
 
        CARACTÉRISTIQUES  GERALT DE RIV : UN PROTAGONISTE UNIQUE 
   Entrez dans la peau de Geralt de Riv, un bretteur charismatique et un tueur de monstres professionnel.
   Faites votre choix parmi plus de 250 capacités spéciales, compétences de combat et pouvoirs magiques pour créer un personnage adapté à votre façon de jouer.        
 
  MONDE FANTASTIQUE ORIGINAL, INSPIRÉ PAR LA LITTÉRATURE 
   Découvrez un monde fantastique rude, inspiré par l'œuvre d'Andrzej Sapkowski, auteur polonais réputé dans l'univers duquel rien n'est jamais blanc ou noir, bon ou mauvais.  
  SCÉNARIO NON LINÉAIRE 
   Plongez dans une histoire épique, pleine de rebondissements, de coups de théâtre et de décisions moralement ambiguës ayant un impact réel sur le déroulement des événements.
   Accomplissez des quêtes de différentes façons pour parvenir à l'une des trois fins différentes de l'histoire, en fonction de vos actions.  
  ACTION TACTIQUE ÉPOUSTOUFLANTE 
   Livrez des combats en temps réel, complexes mais intuitifs, basés sur de véritables techniques de combat à l'épée du Moyen Âge.
   Combattez à l'aide de six styles de combat, de dizaines de potions, d'un système d'alchimie complexe, d'armes modifiables et d'une magie puissante ajoutant tous une profondeur tactique à l'expérience de combat fluide en temps réel.
   La capture de mouvements a été effectuée sur des experts du combat médiéval à Francfort, au fameux studio Metric Minds, ce qui permet au jeu de proposer 600 animations martiales authentiques et spectaculaires.         À PROPOS DE THE WITCHER: ENHANCED EDITION The Witcher: Enhanced Edition reprend les bases du jeu original, récompensé par plus de 90 prix, tout en apportant une série d'améliorations dans le système de jeu et les performances techniques.
    Dialogues et cinématiques améliorés :  plus de 5000 lignes de dialogues ont été réécrites et réenregistrées en anglais, l'édition allemande a été entièrement remasterisée et plus de 200 animations ont été ajoutées pour rendre l'expérience plus cohérente et les personnages plus crédibles dans les dialogues et les cinématiques.
    Inventaire amélioré :  un sac séparé pour les ingrédients alchimiques et la fonction simple de tri et d'empilement facilitent l'organisation et l'utilisation des objets.
    Améliorations techniques :  parmi les nombreuses améliorations techniques, notez des temps de chargement nettement réduits, une meilleure stabilité, des combats plus nerveux, un chargement accéléré de l'inventaire, une option permettant d'activer ou de désactiver la sauvegarde automatique…
    Système de différenciation des personnages :  le système génère de manière aléatoire l'apparence de dizaines de modèles afin de rendre les monstres et les PNJ plus variés.  
 The Witcher Enhanced Edition contient les articles bonus suivants :
   Bande dessinée interactive
   Éditeur d'aventures D'jinni
   Deux nouvelles aventures offrant plus de 5 heures de jeu
   Bande originale officielle
   Album "Music Inspired by The Witcher"
   Vidéos du making-of
   Guide de jeu officiel
   Deux cartes du monde de The Witcher

Entdecke noch weitere Spiele von CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Entdecke noch weitere Spiele von CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel The Witcher ist ein Rollenspiel in einer düsteren Fantasy-Welt voller moralischer Grauzonen, in der die Grenze zwischen Gut und Böse verschwimmt. Story und Charakterentwicklung stehen im Vordergrund, abgerundet von einem taktisch komplexen Echtzeit-Kampfsystem.
 
 Werde zum Hexer Geralt von Riva und finde durch das Netz der Intrigen von Kräften, die grenzenlos machthungrig sind. Triff schwierige Entscheidungen und lebe mit den Konsequenzen in einem Spiel, das dich in ein unvergleichliches Abenteuer eintauchen lässt.
 
        HAUPT-FEATURES  GERALT VON RIVA - EIN EINMALIGER PROTAGONIST 
   Schlüpfe in die Rolle Geralt von Rivas, eines charismatischen Schwertmeisters und professionellen Monsterschlächters.
   Wähle aus über 250 Spezialfähigkeiten, Kampffertigkeiten und magischen Kräften, um den Charakter bestmöglich an deinen Spielstil anzupassen.        
 
  FANTASYWELT AUF BASIS DER BUCHVORLAGE 
   Tauche ein in die brutale Fantasy-Welt auf Basis der Romane des berühmten polnischen Autors Andrzej Sapkowski, in der es kein Schwarz oder Weiß, kein Richtig oder Falsch gibt.  
  NICHTLINEARE STORY 
   Erlebe eine packende Story voller Wendungen, Überraschungen und moralisch zweischneidiger Entscheidungen, die den Verlauf beeinflussen.
   Erfülle Missionen auf unterschiedlichste Art und erlebe, wie das Narrativ je nach deinen Handlungen in einem von drei möglichen Enden gipfelt.  
  VERBLÜFFENDE TAKTIK-ACTION 
   Miss dich in komplexen, doch intuitiven Echtzeitkämpfen auf Basis realer mittelalterlicher Schwertkampftechniken.
   Setze sechs Kampfstile, Dutzende Tränke, das komplexe Alchemiesystem, modifizierbare Waffen und machtvolle Magie ein, um die taktische Tiefe des flüssigen Echtzeit-Erlebnisses zu steigern.
   600 spektakuläre authentische Kampfanimationen bereichern das Spiel dank Motion Capture mit Experten für mittelalterliche Kampftechniken im renommierten Frankfurter Studio Metric Minds.         ÜBER THE WITCHER: ENHANCED EDITION The Witcher: Enhanced Edition optimiert das mit über 90 Branchenauszeichnungen dekorierte Gameplay mit diversen Verbesserungen an Spielverlauf und Technik.
    Optimierte Dialoge und Videosequenzen:  Über 5.000 neu verfasste und eingesprochene Dialogzeilen auf Englisch, vollständige deutsche Sprachversion sowie über 200 neue Gesten-Animationen sorgen für ein konsistenteres Erlebnis und noch glaubwürdigere Charaktere in Dialogen und Videosequenzen.
    Verbessertes Inventar:  Ein separater Sack für alchemistische Zutaten und eine simple Sortier- und Stapelfunktion optimieren Organisation und Nutzung.
    Technische Verbesserungen:  Zahlreiche technische Verbesserungen bedeuten erheblich verringerte Ladezeiten, verbesserte Stabilität, verbesserte Reaktionsempfindlichkeit im Kampf, schnelleres Laden des Inventars, Ein-/Ausschaltmöglichkeit der automatischen Speicherfunktion und vieles mehr.
    System zur Ausdifferenzierung von Charakteren:  Das System randomisiert das Aussehen Dutzender Ingame-Modelle, um Monster sowie NPCs vielfältiger zu gestalten.  
 The Witcher Enhanced Edition bringt die folgenden Bonusgegenstände mit:
   Interaktives Comicbuch
   D'jinni-Abenteuer-Editor
   Zwei neue Abenteuer mit 5+ Spielstunden
   Offizieller Soundtrack
   Album "Music Inspired by The Witcher"
   Making-of-Videos
   Offizieller Spielleitfaden
   Zwei Karten aus der Welt von The Witcher

Check out other games from CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Check out other games from CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Acerca do jogo The Witcher is a role-playing game set in a dark fantasy world where moral ambiguity reigns. Shattering the line between good and evil, the game emphasizes story and character development, while incorporating a tactically-deep, real-time combat system.
 
 Become The Witcher, Geralt of Rivia, and get caught in a web of intrigue woven by forces vying for control of the world. Make difficult decisions and live with the consequences in a game that will immerse you in an extraordinary tale like no other.
 
        KEY FEATURES  GERALT OF RIVIA: A ONE-OF-A-KIND PROTAGONIST 
   Take on the role of Geralt of Rivia: a charismatic swordmaster and professional monster slayer.
   Choose from over 250 special abilities, combat skills and magical powers to build a character best suited to your style of play.        
 
  ORIGINAL FANTASY WORLD DRAWN FROM LITERATURE 
   Enter a harsh fantasy world inspired by the writings of renowned Polish author Andrzej Sapkowski, where nothing is truly black or white, right or wrong.  
  NON-LINEAR STORYLINE 
   Immerse yourself in an epic narrative full of turns, twists and ambiguous moral decisions which have real impact on the storyline.
   Accomplish quests in a variety of ways and see how the narrative culminates in one of three different endings depending on your actions.  
  STUNNING TACTICAL ACTION 
   Engage in elaborate, yet intuitive real-time combat based on real medieval sword-fighting techniques.
   Battle using six combat styles, dozens of potions, complex alchemy system, modifiable weapons and powerful magic which all add tactical depth to the fluid real-time experience.
   Motion capture performed by medieval fighting experts at Frankfurt's renowned Metric Minds studio, resulting in 600 spectacular and authentic in-game combat animations.         ABOUT THE WITCHER: ENHANCED EDITION The Witcher: Enhanced Edition takes all of the acclaimed gameplay that garnered the original game more than 90 industry awards and introduces a number of gameplay and technical improvements.
    Superior dialogue and cutscenes:  Over 5000 rewritten and re-recorded lines of dialogue in English, completely redone German language version, as well as over 200 new gesture animations create a more consistent experience and make characters behave more believably in dialogue and cutscenes.
    Enhanced inventory:  A separate sack for alchemy ingredients, as well as a simple sort-and-stack function streamline item organization and usage.
    Technical improvements:  Numerous technical enhancements feature greatly reduced loading times, improved stability, combat responsiveness, faster inventory loading, an option to turn auto-saving on or off, and more.
    Character differentiation system:  The system randomizes the appearance of dozens of in-game models in order to add more variety to monsters and NPCs.  
 The Witcher Enhanced Edition comes with these bonus items:
   An interactive comic book
   D'jinni Adventure Editor
   Two new adventures offering 5+ hours of gameplay
   Official Soundtrack
   “Music Inspired by The Witcher” album
   “Making of” videos
   Official Game Guide
   Two maps of The Witcher's world

Scopri gli altri giochi di CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Scopri gli altri giochi di CD PROJEKT RED  
 
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco The Witcher è un gioco di ruolo ambientato in un oscuro mondo fantasy dove regna l'ambiguità morale. Ridefinendo il confine tra il bene il male, il gioco pone l'accento sulla storia e sullo sviluppo dei personaggi, il tutto rafforzato da un sistema di combattimento strategico in tempo reale.
 
 Diventa il witcher Geralt di Rivia e lasciati coinvolgere in una rete di intrighi intessuta da forze che bramano il controllo del mondo. Prendi decisioni importanti e accettane le conseguenze in un gioco che ti permetterà di vivere un'avventura come nessun'altra.
 
        CARATTERISTICHE PRINCIPALI  GERALT DI RIVIA: UN PROTAGONISTA DAVVERO UNICO 
   Vesti i panni di Geralt di Rivia, carismatico maestro di spada e uccisore di mostri professionista.
   Scegli tra più di 250 abilità speciali, talenti di combattimento e poteri magici per creare un personaggio adatto al tuo stile di gioco.        
 
  UN MONDO FANTASY TRATTO DA UNA SERIE DI ROMANZI 
   Esplora un complesso mondo fantasy ispirato alle opere letterarie del famoso autore polacco Andrzej Sapkowski, in cui il concetto di giusto e sbagliato o buono e cattivo non è mai assoluto.  
  NARRATIVA NON LINEARE 
   Vivi un'epica avventura ricca di colpi di scena e decisioni moralmente ambigue che hanno un impatto tangibile sullo svolgimento della storia.
   Compi le missioni in vari modi e scopri come la storia si evolve in base alle tue azioni.  
  AVVINCENTE AZIONE STRATEGICA 
   Affronta combattimenti in tempo reale complessi ma intuitivi basati su tecniche di combattimento medievale.
   Combatti usando sei stili di combattimento, decine di pozioni, un sistema alchemico complesso, armi potenziabili e formidabili magie per un'esperienza tattica fluida e in tempo reale.
   Motion capture effettuato dagli esperti di combattimento medievale del rinomato studio Metric Minds di Francoforte, con più 600 spettacolari animazioni di combattimento.         THE WITCHER: ENHANCED EDITION The Witcher: Enhanced Edition riprende il gameplay che ha permesso alla versione originale di ottenere più di 90 premi introducendo tantissime migliorie tecniche.
    Filmati e dialoghi d'eccellenza:  più di 5.000 battute riscritte e riregistrate in inglese, una versione in lingua tedesca completamente riveduta e oltre 200 nuove animazioni per creare un'esperienza cinematografica ancora più autentica.
    Inventario migliorato:  una sacca a parte per ingredienti alchemici e un sistema di organizzazione degli oggetti semplificato.
    Miglioramenti tecnici:  i vari miglioramenti tecnici offrono tempi di caricamento ridotti, maggiore stabilità, migliori interazioni nel combattimento, caricamento dell'inventario più rapido, possibilità di attivare o disattivare il salvataggio automatico e altro ancora.
    Sistema di differenziazione del personaggio:  il sistema introduce casualmente i modelli di vari PNG e mostri per rendere il gioco sempre diverso.  
 The Witcher Enhanced Edition contiene tre elementi bonus:
   Fumetto interattivo
   Editor di avventure D'jinni
   Due nuove avventure che offrono più di 5 ore di gioco complessive
   Colonna sonora ufficiale
   Album "Music Inspired by The Witcher"
   Video della realizzazione del gioco
   Guida ufficiale del gioco
   Due mappe del mondo di The Witcher

game.brief:
Based on the novel series by Andrzej Sapkowski, The Witcher follows Geralt of Rivia, an amnesiac witcher (problem solver and slayer of monsters) whose home, the Kaer Morhen citadel, is besieged by an organization called the Salamandra, who steal their valuable potions and get away. Throughout the game, Geralt must resolve people's moral dilemmas, connect the dots of his past and track down the Salamandra.

The game begins when Geralt of Rivia, one of a few remaining "witchers" – traveling monster hunters for hire, gifted with unnatural powers, is transported to the witcher stronghold of Kaer Morhen by fellow witchers who had discovered him unconscious in a field. Geralt remembers almost nothing of his life before that point. He is taken to Kaer Morhen, the base of the witchers, where he meets a sorceress named Triss Merigold. The castle is attacked by a gang of bandits named Salamandra, led by a criminal known as the Professor, a mage named Savolla who controls a large, praying mantis-like monster, and another mage named Azar Javed. The witchers and the sorceress manage to slay the monster and kill Savolla, but the Professor and Azar manage to escape with the mutagens that genetically alter the witchers. After curing Triss of the wounds she received while fighting Javed, Geralt and the rest of the witchers head off in different directions in order to find information on Salamandra.

game.title: Party Club
game.description:
PLAY WITH FRIENDS! 
  Play solo or with up to 4 friends in couch mode or online co-op mode, and turn your venue into the hottest spot in the region.
   
   SEAT AND SERVE 
  Greet customers at the door, choose their seats, and manage their satisfaction. If someone’s too much to handle, you can always give them the boot—literally!
     
   BE AWARE OF CUSTOMER TYPES 
  Your customers are animals with unique personalities and seating preferences. Be careful—seating a panda next to a tiger might not end well! 
   You better watch out for special customers, while some may involuntarily release gas and knock you out, others may try to knock you out with old methods.    
     
   ORGANIZE YOUR VENUE 
  Set up tables, juice machines, and even toilets wherever you like! Make purchases at the end of each day and strategize your layout to handle the flow of customers and challenges.
  
     
   PROVE YOURSELF TO MASTER MIXOLOGISTS 
  Experience the challenges of different regions and prove yourself to the master mixologists of those lands.

   BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY DON'T FORGET TO HAVE FUN!

localized_description.text:
无论是线上联机还是本地合作，你都能与最多3名好友一起经营这家《小动物餐吧》。作为餐吧老板，你们需要分工合作，一人接引顾客，一人调配饮品，另一人则负责安抚顾客的情绪……或是全员手忙脚乱，笑料不断！你们的目标是将餐吧打造成为当地最热门的“聚会圣地”，吸引源源不断的动物顾客光临！
  
    
   
  每位顾客都拥有独特的个性和座位偏好。例如，暴躁的老虎一生气就会掀翻桌子、憨厚的野牛讨厌上餐太慢、调皮的臭鼬可能会突然“释放气体”让周围的人晕倒！小心，千万别把大灰狼的座位安排在兔子旁边，这可能会让局面变的棘手！当然，你也可以在事情失控前采用一些“物理手段”（比如拿起木板，将闹事的顾客赶出去！），要知道，平衡好顾客之间的关系，才能将餐吧更好的经营下去。   
  
    
   
  从饮品机的位置到餐吧的整体风格，一切由你掌控！每当营业结束，你都可以用赚取的钱购买新设备、调整布局以满足不同顾客的需求。随着餐吧规模的不断扩大，你将解锁更多设施，还可以前往全新的地区，结识更多性格各异的顾客，迎接新的挑战，考验你餐吧管理技巧的时刻到了。你还能一如既往地征服这些新顾客吗？
  
   
   
   
   但别忘了，享受其中的乐趣才是最重要的！

無論是線上聯機還是本地合作，你都能與最多3名好友一起經營這家《小動物餐吧》。作為餐吧老闆，你們需要分工合作，一人接引顧客，一人調配飲品，另一人則負責安撫顧客的情緒……或是全員手忙腳亂，笑料不斷！你們的目標是將餐吧打造成為當地最熱門的“聚會聖地”，吸引源源不斷的動物顧客光臨！
   
   
   
  每位顧客都擁有獨特的個性和座位偏好。例如，暴躁的老虎一生氣就會掀翻桌子、憨厚的野牛討厭上餐太慢、調皮的臭鼬可能會突然“釋放氣體”讓周圍的人暈倒！小心，千萬別把大灰狼的座位安排在兔子旁邊，這可能會讓局面變的棘手！當然，你也可以在事情失控前採用一些“物理手段”（比如拿起木板，將鬧事的顧客趕出去！），要知道，平衡好顧客之間的關係，才能將餐吧更好的經營下去。   
  
    
   
  從飲品機的位置到餐吧的整體風格，一切由你掌控！每當營業結束，你都可以用賺取的錢購買新設備、調整布局以滿足不同顧客的需求。隨著餐吧規模的不斷擴大，你將解鎖更多設施，還可以前往全新的地區，結識更多性格各異的顧客，迎接新的挑戰，考驗你餐吧管理技巧的時刻到了。你還能一如既往地征服這些新顧客嗎？
  
   
   
   
   但別忘了，享受其中的樂趣才是最重要的！

PLAY WITH FRIENDS! 
  Play solo or with up to 4 friends in couch mode or online co-op mode, and turn your venue into the hottest spot in the region.
   
   SEAT AND SERVE 
  Greet customers at the door, choose their seats, and manage their satisfaction. If someone’s too much to handle, you can always give them the boot—literally!
     
   BE AWARE OF CUSTOMER TYPES 
  Your customers are animals with unique personalities and seating preferences. Be careful—seating a panda next to a tiger might not end well! 
   You better watch out for special customers, while some may involuntarily release gas and knock you out, others may try to knock you out with old methods.    
     
   ORGANIZE YOUR VENUE 
  Set up tables, juice machines, and even toilets wherever you like! Make purchases at the end of each day and strategize your layout to handle the flow of customers and challenges.
  
     
   PROVE YOURSELF TO MASTER MIXOLOGISTS 
  Experience the challenges of different regions and prove yourself to the master mixologists of those lands.

   BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY DON'T FORGET TO HAVE FUN!

¡JUEGA CON AMIGOS! 
  Juega en solitario o en un equipo con hasta 4 jugadores en modo local o cooperativo en línea y consigue que tu local sea el más concurrido de la región.
   
   SIENTA Y SIRVE A LOS CLIENTES 
  Recibe a los clientes en la entrada, elige sus asientos y déjalos satisfechos. Si alguno te da demasiados problemas, puedes patearle el culo, ¡literalmente!
     
   TEN EN CUENTA LOS TIPOS DE CLIENTES 
  Tus clientes son animales con personalidades y preferencias de asiento únicas. Por ejemplo, si sientas a un panda con un tigre, ¡la cosa podría acabar mal!
  Mantente alerta con los clientes especiales: algunos podrían soltar gases y noquearte, mientras que otros podrían intentar hacerlo con métodos más tradicionales.   
     
   ORGANIZA TU LOCAL 
  ¡Coloca mesas, máquinas de zumos e incluso aseos donde más te guste! Compra objetos al final de cada día y colócalos estratégicamente para afrontar la afluencia de clientes y otros desafíos.
     
   DEMUESTRA QUE DOMINAS LA MIXOLOGÍA 
  Prueba los retos de cada región y conviértete en un referente entre los grandes mixólogos.

   PERO LO MÁS IMPORTANTE: ¡DIVIÉRTETE POR ENCIMA DE TODO!

JOUEZ AVEC VOS AMIS ! 
  Jouez en solo ou en équipe jusqu'à 4 joueurs, en mode local ou en ligne, et faites de votre établissement l'endroit le plus branché du coin. 
   
   PLACEZ VOS CLIENTS ET SERVEZ-LES 
  Accueillez vos clients, placez-les et satisfaites leurs demandes. Si l'un d'entre eux est trop exigeant, mettez-le à la porte !
   
   FAITES ATTENTION AUX PROFILS DE VOS CLIENTS 
  Vos clients sont des animaux aux personnalités uniques, et chacun a ses préférences. Placer un panda à côté d'un tigre pourrait mal finir !
  Méfiez-vous des clients particuliers : certains pourraient vous assommer accidentellement en lâchant des gaz, d'autres en usant de méthodes plus classiques.   
     
   AMÉNAGEZ VOTRE SALLE 
  Installez des tables, des machines à jus et même des toilettes ! Faites vos achats à la fin de chaque journée et adaptez votre agencement à l'afflux de clients et aux défis à relever.
     
   FAITES VOS PREUVES AUPRÈS DES MEILLEURS MIXOLOGUES 
  Relevez les défis des différentes régions et faites vos preuves auprès des meilleurs mixologues.
    
   ET SURTOUT, AMUSEZ-VOUS !

SPIELE MIT FREUNDEN! 
  Spiele alleine oder in einem Team aus bis zu 4 Spielern im Couch-Modus oder Online-Koop-Modus und verwandle dein Lokal in die angesagteste Location der Region.
   
   PLATZ ZUWEISEN UND BEDIENEN 
  Begrüße die Gäste an der Tür, weise ihnen Plätze an den Tischen zu und stell sie zufrieden. Falls dir bestimmte Gäste über den Kopf wachsen, kannst du sie einfach mit einem Tritt hinausbefördern!
  
     
   ACHTE AUF DIE ART DER GÄSTE 
  Bei deinen Gästen handelt es sich um Tiere mit einzigartigen Charaktereigenschaften und Sitzvorlieben. Sei vorsichtig: Wenn du einen Panda mit einem Tiger an einen Tisch setzt, könnte das böse enden!
  Und behalte stets deine Spezialgäste im Auge: Einige von ihnen könnten dich unfreiwillig mit übelriechenden Gasen außer Gefecht setzen, während andere dafür vielleicht auf althergebrachte Methoden zurückgreifen werden.   

   RICHTE DEIN LOKAL EIN 
  Platziere Tische, Saftmaschinen und sogar Klos, wo immer du willst! Tätige am Ende eines jeden Tages Einkäufe, um deine Ausstattung strategisch zu erweitern, damit du den Ansturm der Gäste und andere Herausforderungen bewältigen kannst.
  
   BEWEISE MEISTERHAFTEN BARKEEPERN DEIN KÖNNEN 
  Stell dich den Herausforderungen verschiedener Regionen und zeig den meisterhaften Barkeepern dort, was du draufhast.
    
   ABER AM WICHTIGSTEN: HAB EINE MENGE SPASS!

オンラインやローカルでの協力プレイが可能で、最大3人の友達と一緒に『Party Club』を経営できます。店主として、役割を分担してお客様を迎え、ドリンクを作り、他のスタッフは顧客を落ち着かせる役割を担います…または、全員がバタバタして笑いが絶えない状態に！あなたの目標は、レストランを「地元の人気スポット」にすることです。動物たちが絶え間なく訪れるようにしましょう！
  
    
   
  各顧客は独自の性格と座席の好みを持っています。例えば、怒りっぽい虎は一度怒るとテーブルをひっくり返し、心優しい野牛は遅い料理が嫌い、いたずら好きなスカンクは突然「ガス」を放って周囲の人を気絶させるかも！大きな灰色狼の座席をウサギの隣に配置すると、危険な状況に発展するかもしれません！もちろん、事態が制御不能になる前に「物理的手段」を取ることもできます（例えば、木の板を使って騒いでいる客を追い出す！）。お客様同士の関係をうまく調整することが、レストランをうまく運営する鍵です。   
  
    
   
  ドリンクマシンの位置からレストラン全体のデザインまで、すべてあなたの手の中！営業が終わるたびに、稼いだお金で新しい設備を購入し、レイアウトを変更して、様々な顧客のニーズに応じましょう。レストランの規模が大きくなるにつれて、さらに多くの設備がアンロックされ、新たなエリアにも進出し、個性豊かな顧客に出会い、新たな挑戦が待っています。あなたの運営スキルが試される時が来ました。新しい顧客たちを征服できるでしょうか？
  
    
   
   でも、何よりも大切なのは楽しむことを忘れないことです！

GIOCA CON GLI AMICI! 
  Gioca in solitaria o in una squadra con un massimo di 4 giocatori nelle modalità locale e cooperativa online, e trasforma il tuo locale nel luogo più in voga della regione.

   ACCOGLI E SERVI DA BERE 
  Accogli i clienti alla porta, scegli dove farli accomodare e cerca di soddisfarli. Se qualcuno è troppo difficile da accontentare, puoi sempre buttarlo fuori... letteralmente!

   FAI ATTENZIONE AI VARI TIPI DI CLIENTE 
  I tuoi clienti sono animali dalle personalità uniche e gusti specifici per i posti a sedere. Fai attenzione: mettere un panda vicino a una tigre potrebbe essere una pessima idea!
  Occhio ai clienti speciali: c'è chi ti stende con una flatulenza involontaria e chi usa metodi più... vecchia scuola!   

   ORGANIZZA IL TUO LOCALE 
  Sistema i tavoli, gli spillatori di succhi e perfino le lettiere ovunque tu voglia! Fai acquisti a ogni fine giornata e organizza il tuo spazio per gestire ondate di clienti e superare ogni sfida!

   METTI ALLA PROVA LE TUE ABILITÀ DAVANTI AI GRANDI BARMAN 
  Divertiti con le sfide che troverai nelle diverse regioni e affronta i maestri barman di quei luoghi per dimostrargli chi comanda al bancone!

   MA SOPRATTUTTO NON DIMENTICARE DI DIVERTIRTI!

game.brief:
PLAY WITH FRIENDS! 
  Play solo or with up to 4 friends in couch mode or online co-op mode, and turn your venue into the hottest spot in the region.
   
   SEAT AND SERVE 
  Greet customers at the door, choose their seats, and manage their satisfaction. If someone’s too much to handle, you can always give them the boot—literally!
     
   BE AWARE OF CUSTOMER TYPES 
  Your customers are animals with unique personalities and seating preferences. Be careful—seating a panda next to a tiger might not end well! 
   You better watch out for special customers, while some may involuntarily release gas and knock you out, others may try to knock you out with old methods.    
     
   ORGANIZE YOUR VENUE 
  Set up tables, juice machines, and even toilets wherever you like! Make purchases at the end of each day and strategize your layout to handle the flow of customers and challenges.
  
     
   PROVE YOURSELF TO MASTER MIXOLOGISTS 
  Experience the challenges of different regions and prove yourself to the master mixologists of those lands.

   BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY DON'T FORGET TO HAVE FUN!

game.title: SILT
game.description:
More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  About the Game  
 
  SILT is a surreal underwater puzzle-adventure game.  Alone in an underwater abyss, you are a diver searching the deep to uncover long-forgotten mysteries. Possess the creatures around you to solve puzzles and travel further into the darkness…
 
  
 
  Nature has evolved into bizarre forms.  Discover strange organisms, unexplored ruins and ancient machinery hidden beneath the water’s surface. 
 
  
 
  Survive encounters with giant deep-sea goliaths.  Harness their power to awaken a long-dormant force at the centre of the abyss.
 
  
 
  Experience art brought to life.  SILT’s unsettling, monochrome world is constructed from the sketches and dark imagination of artist Mr Mead. A harrowing journey awaits you…
 
  
 
  EPILEPSY WARNING 
   
 Please read before playing this game or allowing your children to play it:
   
 Some people are susceptible to epileptic seizures or loss of consciousness when exposed to certain flashing lights and moving patterns in everyday life. Such people may have a seizure while watching television images or playing certain video games. This may happen even if the person has no medical history of epilepsy or has never had any epileptic seizures. 
   
 If you or anyone in your family has ever had symptoms related to epilepsy (seizures or loss of consciousness) when exposed to flashing lights or moving patterns, consult your doctor prior to playing this game. If you or your family experience any symptoms of seizure while playing this game, such as dizziness, nausea, or loss of consciousness, stop playing immediately and seek medical attention.

localized_description.text:
More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  关于游戏  
 
 Silt一款超现实的海洋探索游戏。你是一名潜水员，独自在深海中寻找被遗忘已久的秘密。占有你周围的生物来解开谜题，并向更深的黑暗处进发……
 
  
 
 大自然已经演变成各种奇异的形态。探索隐藏在水面下的奇怪生物、未被探索的遗迹和古代机械。 
 
  
 
 在与深海巨物的对抗中幸存下来。利用它们的力量唤醒深渊中心蛰伏已久的魔力。
 
  
 
 将体验艺术带进生活。Silt这个令人悸动的单色世界是由艺术家Mr Mead的草图和黑暗的想象构建而成。一段令人不安的旅程在等着你……
 
  
 
  癫痫警告 
   
 请在您或您的孩子开始游戏之前仔细阅读。
 
 有些人在日常生活中接触到某些闪光和移动图案时，很容易出现癫痫发作或失去意识的情况。这类人在观看电视图像或进行某些电子游戏时可能会导致癫痫发作。即使没有癫痫病史或从未发作过，也可能发生这种情况。
 
 如果您或您的家人在接触闪光或移动图案时曾经出现过与癫痫相关的症状（癫痫发作或失去意识），在开始游戏前请咨询您的医生。如果您或您的家人在进行游戏时出现任何癫痫症状，如头晕、恶心或失去意识，请立即停止游戏并寻求医疗救助。

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  關於此遊戲  
 
 《Silt》是款超現實的海洋探險遊戲。你是名獨自處在水下深淵的潛水夫，搜索著深處以揭開早已受人遺忘的謎團。佔有周圍的生物以解開謎題，並游往更深處的黑暗之中……
 
  
 
 自然進化成了詭異的型態。發掘奇特的有機物、未探索的遺跡，以及隱藏在水面下的古老機械。 
 
  
 
 在與深海巨怪的奇遇中生存下來。駕馭這些巨怪的力量，以喚醒深淵之中沉睡已久的力量。
 
  
 
 快來體驗栩栩如生的藝術風格。《Silt》中令人不安的黑白世界，建構於藝術家 Mr Mead 的素描作品及黑暗想像。一趟驚險刺激的旅程正等著你來探索……
 
  
 
  癲癇警告 
   
 您欲遊玩本遊戲或讓您的孩童遊玩本遊戲前，請務必詳細閱讀。
 
 有些人在日常生活當中，接觸特定閃光或移動畫面時，容易引起癲癇發作或失去意識的情況。而這樣的人群觀看電視畫面或遊玩特定電玩時，可能會產生痙攣的情形。即使該人士無任何癲癇病史，或未曾有過癲癇發作，仍有可能發生這樣的情況。
 
 若您本身或家庭成員接觸閃光或移動畫面時，曾出現過與癲癇相關的症狀（痙攣或失去意識），遊玩本遊戲前請先諮詢您的醫師。若您本身或家庭成員遊玩本遊戲時，出現了任何痙攣的症狀，例如暈眩、作嘔，或失去意識，請立即停止遊玩，並尋求醫護協助。

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  About the Game  
 
  SILT is a surreal underwater puzzle-adventure game.  Alone in an underwater abyss, you are a diver searching the deep to uncover long-forgotten mysteries. Possess the creatures around you to solve puzzles and travel further into the darkness…
 
  
 
  Nature has evolved into bizarre forms.  Discover strange organisms, unexplored ruins and ancient machinery hidden beneath the water’s surface. 
 
  
 
  Survive encounters with giant deep-sea goliaths.  Harness their power to awaken a long-dormant force at the centre of the abyss.
 
  
 
  Experience art brought to life.  SILT’s unsettling, monochrome world is constructed from the sketches and dark imagination of artist Mr Mead. A harrowing journey awaits you…
 
  
 
  EPILEPSY WARNING 
   
 Please read before playing this game or allowing your children to play it:
   
 Some people are susceptible to epileptic seizures or loss of consciousness when exposed to certain flashing lights and moving patterns in everyday life. Such people may have a seizure while watching television images or playing certain video games. This may happen even if the person has no medical history of epilepsy or has never had any epileptic seizures. 
   
 If you or anyone in your family has ever had symptoms related to epilepsy (seizures or loss of consciousness) when exposed to flashing lights or moving patterns, consult your doctor prior to playing this game. If you or your family experience any symptoms of seizure while playing this game, such as dizziness, nausea, or loss of consciousness, stop playing immediately and seek medical attention.

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  Acerca del juego  
 
  Silt es un juego de exploración oceánica surrealista.  Eres un buzo explorando en solitario las profundidades de un abismo submarino en busca de misterios olvidados en el tiempo. Posee a las criaturas a tu alrededor para resolver rompecabezas y aventurarte más alá de la oscuridad.
 
  
 
  La naturaleza ha evolucionado, adaptando extravagantes formas.  Descubre extraños organismos, ruinas inexploradas y una maquinaria ancestral oculta bajo la superficie del agua. 
 
  
 
  Sobrevive a encuentros con goliats de las aguas profundas  y controla su poder para despertar una fuerza latente hace tiempo en el centro del abismo.
 
  
 
  Vive una experiencia en la que el arte cobra vida.  El inquietante mundo monocromático de Silt ha sido creado a partir de los bocetos y la oscura imaginación del artista Mr Mead. Te aguarda un viaje espeluznante...
 
  
 
  AVISO SOBRE EPILEPSIA 
   
 Por favor, lee este mensaje antes de probar este juego o de permitir que jueguen niños.
   
 Algunas personas son susceptibles a sufrir ataques epilépticos o pérdidas de conocimiento al exponerse a ciertas luces parpadeantes o patrones de movimiento de la vida diaria. Dichas personas podrían sufrir convulsiones viendo imágenes de televisión o jugando a determinados videojuegos. Podría darse incluso en el caso de no existir historial previo de epilepsia y de no haber sufrido nunca ataques epilépticos. 
   
 Si tú o alguien de tu familia ha experimentado alguna vez síntomas relacionados con la epilepsia (convulsiones o pérdidas de conocimiento) al exponeros a luces parpadeantes o patrones de movimiento, consulta con tu médico antes de utilizar este juego. Asimismo, si tú o alguien de tu familia experimentáis cualquier síntoma o convulsión jugando a este juego, como mareo, náuseas o pérdida de conocimiento, recomendamos dejar de jugar de inmediato y buscar atención médica.

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  À propos du jeu  
 
  Silt est un jeu d'exploration océanique surréaliste.  Seul dans les abysses, vous incarnez un plongeur parcourant les profondeurs pour élucider les mystères qui y sont enfouis. Possédez les créatures environnantes pour résoudre les énigmes et vous enfoncer toujours plus profondément dans les ténèbres.
 
  
 
  La nature a évolué sous les formes les plus bizarres.  Découvrez ces étranges organismes et parcourez les ruines sous-marines et les anciennes structures mécaniques cachées tout au fond de l'océan.
 
  
 
  Survivez à votre rencontre avec les goliaths des abysses  et exploitez leur pouvoir pour réveiller la force sommeillant dans les profondeurs.
 
  
 
  L'art prend vie !  Le troublant univers monochrome de Silt est le fruit des croquis et de la sombre imagination de Mr Mead. Un voyage éprouvant vous attend…
 
  
 
  AVERTISSEMENT SUR L'ÉPILEPSIE 
   
 À consulter avant de jouer à ce jeu ou de laisser vos enfants y jouer.
   
 Certaines personnes sont susceptibles de faire des crises d'épilepsie ou de perdre connaissance à la vue de certaines lumières clignotantes ou de motifs changeants dans la vie quotidienne. Ces personnes peuvent faire des crises d'épilepsie en regardant des images à la télévision ou en jouant à certains jeux vidéo. Cela peut se produire même si la personne n'a aucun antécédent médical ou n'a jamais fait de crise d'épilepsie.
   
 Si vous ou un membre de votre famille avez déjà présenté des symptômes associés à l'épilepsie (crises ou pertes de connaissance) à la vue de lumières clignotantes ou de schémas changeants, consultez votre médecin avant de jouer à ce jeu. Si vous ou un membre de votre famille présentez les symptômes d'une crise d'épilepsie en jouant à ce jeu, tels que vertiges, nausée ou perte de connaissance, arrêtez de jouer immédiatement et consultez un médecin.

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  Infos zum Spiel  
 
  Silt ist ein surreales Ozean-Erkundungsspiel.  Allein in einem Unterwasserabgrund bist du ein Taucher, der die Tiefe erforscht, um längst vergessene Geheimnisse aufzudecken. Nimm die Kreaturen um dich herum in Besitz, um Rätsel zu lösen und weiter in die Dunkelheit vorzudringen ...
 
  
 
  Die Natur hat sich zu bizarren Formen entwickelt.  Entdecke seltsame Organismen, unerforschte Ruinen und uralte Maschinen, die unter der Wasseroberfläche verborgen liegen.
 
  
 
  Überlebe Begegnungen mit riesigen Tiefsee-Goliaths.  Nutze ihre Kräfte, um eine lange schlummernde Macht im Zentrum des Abgrunds zu erwecken.
 
  
 
  Erlebe zum Leben erweckte Kunst.  Die beunruhigende, monochrome Welt von Silt wurde aus den Skizzen und der dunklen Fantasie des Künstlers Mr. Mead erschaffen. Eine erschütternde Reise erwartet dich ...
 
  
 
  EPILEPSIE-WARNUNG 
   
 Bitte lies diesen Hinweis, bevor du das Spiel spielst oder deinen Kindern erlaubst, es zu spielen.
   
 Manche Menschen sind anfällig für epileptische Anfälle oder Bewusstseinsverlust, wenn sie im Alltag bestimmten blinkenden Lichtern und Bewegungsmustern ausgesetzt sind. Solche Menschen können einen Anfall bekommen, wenn sie Fernsehbilder sehen oder bestimmte Videospiele spielen. Dies kann auch dann geschehen, wenn die betreffende Person keine Vorgeschichte von Epilepsie hat oder noch nie einen epileptischen Anfall hatte.
   
 Falls du oder jemand in deiner Familie jemals Symptome im Zusammenhang mit Epilepsie (Anfälle oder Bewusstlosigkeit) hatte, wenn du blinkenden Lichtern oder sich bewegenden Mustern ausgesetzt warst, dann konsultiere deinen Arzt, bevor du dieses Spiel spielst. Wenn du oder jemand in deiner Familie beim Spielen dieses Spiels Symptome eines Anfalls verspürt, wie Schwindel, Übelkeit oder Bewusstlosigkeit, dann höre sofort auf zu spielen und suche einen Arzt auf.

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  Acerca do jogo  
 
 Silt é um jogo de aventura e quebra-cabeças subaquático e surreal. Sozinho num abismo sob as águas, és um mergulhador que percorre as profundezas para desvendar mistérios há muito esquecidos. Controla as criaturas em teu redor para resolver quebra-cabeças e penetrar na escuridão…
 
  
 
 A natureza evoluiu para formas bizarras. Descobre organismos estranhos, ruínas inexploradas e máquinas antigas ocultas sob a superfície das águas.
 
  
 
 Sobrevive a encontros com seres poderosos e gigantes no fundo do mar. Usa o teu poder para despertar uma força há muito adormecida no centro do abismo.
 
  
 
 Vê a arte ganhar forma. O mundo monocromático e inquietante de Silt é construído a partir dos desenhos e da imaginação sombria do artista Mr Mead. Uma jornada arrepiante espera por ti…

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  ゲームについて  
 
 『Silt』は奇妙で非現実的な海の世界が舞台となるパズルアドベンチャーゲームです。ダイバーのあなたは、忘れられた謎を求めて単身深海を進みます。深淵に住む生物に「憑依」してパズルを解き、暗闇の奥深くへと足を延ばしましょう…
 
  
 
 自然は異様な姿へと形を変えました。奇妙な生命体や未踏の廃墟を発見し、海底に眠る古代の機械の姿をその目で確かめましょう。 
 
  
 
 深海に潜む「巨獣」との戦いに生き残りましょう。ねじ伏せた巨獣の力で、深淵の中心で悠久の時を眠る大いなる存在を呼び醒ますのです。
 
  
 
 『Silt』の不気味なモノクロの世界は、アーティスト「Mr Mead」のスケッチとダークな想像力が現実となったものです。おぞましい冒険が、あなたを待ち受けています…
 
  
 
 てんかんについての警告 - 本ゲームをプレイ、またはお子様にプレイさせる前にお読みください。
 
 特定の光の点滅や光の移動パターンを見て、てんかんの発作や失神などの症状を発症する方がおられます。該当する方の場合、テレビのイメージを見たり、特定のテレビゲームをプレイすると症状が発生する可能性があります。さらにこの症状はてんかんの病歴やてんかんの発作を経験したことがない方にも発生する場合があります。
 
 特定の光の点滅や光の移動パターンなどを見て、てんかんに関連する症状（発作または失神）を経験されたことがある方、またはご家族に経験された方がおられる場合、ゲームをプレイする前に医師に相談してください。本ゲームをプレイ中にめまいや吐き気、失神などの発作の症状が発生した、またはご家族に症状が発生した場合、すぐにプレイを中断して医師の診断を受けてください。

  SILT is a surreal underwater puzzle-adventure game.  Alone in an underwater abyss, you are a diver searching the deep to uncover long-forgotten mysteries. Possess the creatures around you to solve puzzles and travel further into the darkness…

If you or your family experience any symptoms of seizure while playing this game, such as dizziness, nausea, or loss of consciousness, stop playing immediately and seek medical attention.

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  Om spillet  
 
 Silt er et surrealistisk hovedbruds-eventyrspil, der foregår under vandet. Du er en dykker, alene og langt nede under vandoverfladen, som gennemsøger dybet for at afdække mysterier, der for længst er blevet glemt. Tag kontrol over væsnerne omkring dig for at løse hovedbrud og rejse længere ind i mørket ...
 
  
 
 Naturen har udviklet bizarre former. Opdag mærkelige organismer, uudforskede ruiner og oldgammelt maskineri, skjult under vandoverfladen. 
 
  
 
 Overlev møder med gigantiske dybhavsgoliater. Udnyt deres styrker til at vække en kraft, der længe har ligget i dvale nede i dybet.
 
  
 
 Oplev kunst bragt til live. Silts foruroligende, monokrome verden er skabt ud fra kunstneren Mr Meads skitser og mørke fantasi. En foruroligende rejse venter dig forude ...

More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  Informazioni sul gioco  
 
  Silt è un surreale gioco di esplorazione dell'oceano.  Da solo in un abisso sottomarino, vestirai i panni di un sommozzatore che scandaglia gli abissi alla scoperta di misteri da tempo dimenticati. Impadronisciti delle creature intorno a te per risolvere enigmi e sprofondare ancor di più nell'oscurità...
 
  
 
  La natura si è evoluta in forme bizzarre.  Scopri strani organismi, rovine inesplorate e macchinari antichi nascosti sotto la superficie dell'acqua. 
 
  
 
  Sopravvivi agli incontri con giganteschi colossi sottomarini.  Sfrutta il loro potere per risvegliare una forza a lungo assopita nel cuore degli abissi.
 
  
 
  Sperimenta una grafica che prende vita.  L'inquietante mondo monocromatico di Silt è frutto degli schizzi e dell'oscura fantasia dell'artista Mr Mead. Ti attende un viaggio tormentoso...

 Por favor, lee este mensaje antes de probar este juego o de permitir que jueguen niños.
   
 Algunas personas son susceptibles a sufrir ataques epilépticos o pérdidas de conocimiento al exponerse a ciertas luces parpadeantes o patrones de movimiento de la vida diaria. Dichas personas podrían sufrir convulsiones viendo imágenes de televisión o jugando a determinados videojuegos. Podría darse incluso en el caso de no existir historial previo de epilepsia y de no haber sufrido nunca ataques epilépticos. 
   
 Si tú o alguien de tu familia ha experimentado alguna vez síntomas relacionados con la epilepsia (convulsiones o pérdidas de conocimiento) al exponeros a luces parpadeantes o patrones de movimiento, consulta con tu médico antes de utilizar este juego. Asimismo, si tú o alguien de tu familia experimentáis cualquier síntoma o convulsión jugando a este juego, como mareo, náuseas o pérdida de conocimiento, recomendamos dejar de jugar de inmediato y buscar atención médica.

game.brief:
More Great Fireshine Games  
 
  About the Game  
 
  SILT is a surreal underwater puzzle-adventure game.  Alone in an underwater abyss, you are a diver searching the deep to uncover long-forgotten mysteries. Possess the creatures around you to solve puzzles and travel further into the darkness…
 
  
 
  Nature has evolved into bizarre forms.  Discover strange organisms, unexplored ruins and ancient machinery hidden beneath the water’s surface. 
 
  
 
  Survive encounters with giant deep-sea goliaths.  Harness their power to awaken a long-dormant force at the centre of the abyss.
 
  
 
  Experience art brought to life.  SILT’s unsettling, monochrome world is constructed from the sketches and dark imagination of artist Mr Mead. A harrowing journey awaits you…
 
  
 
  EPILEPSY WARNING 
   
 Please read before playing this game or allowing your children to play it:
   
 Some people are susceptible to epileptic seizures or loss of consciousness when exposed to certain flashing lights and moving patterns in everyday life. Such people may have a seizure while watching television images or playing certain video games. This may happen even if the person has no medical history of epilepsy or has never had any epileptic seizures. 
   
 If you or anyone in your family has ever had symptoms related to epilepsy (seizures or loss of consciousness) when exposed to flashing lights or moving patterns, consult your doctor prior to playing this game. If you or your family experience any symptoms of seizure while playing this game, such as dizziness, nausea, or loss of consciousness, stop playing immediately and seek medical attention.

game.title: Shogun Showdown
game.description:
Turn-based combat where every action counts. Carefully position yourself, build up and unleash your attacks at the right time!  
 
   Upgrade your attack tiles and combo them!

   Gain new skills and build the best deck you can before facing the Shogun.  
 
   Rogue-like: death is not the end, but the beginning of your journey towards mastery. As you play, you will unlock new characters, attacks, skills and more!

   Enjoy a Japanese-inspired setting with pixel art graphics.

localized_description.text:
《将军 对决》是一款带有肉鸽和卡组构筑元素的回合制战斗游戏，在正确的时间进行移动和攻击，升级你的行动和卡组，准备好迎击将军吧！

【主要特色】
回合制战斗意味着你的每个动作都很重要。请谨慎地放置自己，构筑卡组并在适当的时候释放你的攻击!
升级你的攻击，并将它们组合起来!
在面对将军之前，获得新的技能并建立最佳卡组吧！
Rogue-like：死亡不是结束，而是你走向高手旅程的开始。随着你游戏的继续，你将解锁新的角色、攻击、技能和更多游戏内容
来体验日式背景的像素风格吧！

Turn-based combat where every action counts. Carefully position yourself, build up and unleash your attacks at the right time!  
 
   Upgrade your attack tiles and combo them!

   Gain new skills and build the best deck you can before facing the Shogun.  
 
   Rogue-like: death is not the end, but the beginning of your journey towards mastery. As you play, you will unlock new characters, attacks, skills and more!

   Enjoy a Japanese-inspired setting with pixel art graphics.

Combate por turnos donde cada acción cuenta. ¡Posiciónate con cuidado, prepara tus ataques y desata todo tu poder en el momento adecuado!  
 
   Mejora tus fichas de ataque y realiza las mejores combinaciones posibles.

   Adquiere nuevas habilidades y construye el mazo óptimo antes de enfrentarte al Shogun.  
 
   Rogue-like: la muerte no es el fin, sino el comienzo de tu búsqueda hacia la maestría. A medida que juegas, desbloquearás nuevos personajes, ataques, habilidades ¡y mucho más!

   Disfruta de un entorno inspirado en Japón con gráficos de estilo pixel art.

Combat au tour par tour où chaque action compte. Positionnez-vous avec soin, préparez vos attaques et déchaînez-les au bon moment !  
 
   Améliorez vos tuiles d'attaque et faites les meilleurs combos possibles.

   Acquérez de nouvelles compétences et construisez le deck optimal avant de faire face au Shogun.  
 
   Rogue-like : la mort n'est pas la fin, mais le début de votre quête vers la maîtrise. Au fur et à mesure que vous jouez, vous débloquerez de nouveaux personnages, attaques, compétences et bien plus encore !

   Profitez d'un univers d'inspiration japonaise avec des graphismes en pixel art.

Rundenbasierter Kampf, in dem jede Aktion zählt. Positioniere dich klug, bau deine Angriffe auf und lass sie im richtigen Augenblick auf deine Gegner los!  
 
   Verbessere deine Angriffskacheln und kombiniere sie!

   Erhalte neue Fähigkeiten und bau das bestmögliche Deck, bevor du dich dem Shogun entgegenstellst.  
 
   Roguelike: Der Tod ist nicht das Ende, sondern der Anfang deines Wegs zur Meisterschaft. Während du spielst, schaltest du neue Charaktere, Angriffe, Fähigkeiten und mehr frei!

   Erlebe ein japanisches Setting in Pixel Art.

Combate baseado em turnos em que cada ação faz diferença. Posicione-se cuidadosamente, prepare suas ações e lance os ataques na hora certa!  
 
   Melhore suas peças de ataque e faça combos!

   Ganhe novas habilidades e monte o melhor baralho que puder antes de enfrentar o Shogun.  
 
   Roguelike: a morte não é o fim, mas o início da sua jornada para a maestria. Jogue para desbloquear novos personagens, ataques, habilidades e muito mais!
 
  Curta a ambientação inspirada no Japão com gráficos em pixel art.
