Cinco años después de los acontecimientos del galardonado Star Wars® Knights of the Old Republic™, los Señores Sith han cazado a los Jedi hasta llevarlos al borde de la extinción y están próximos a aplastar la Antigua República. Con la Orden Jedi en ruinas, la única esperanza de la República es un Jedi solitario luchando por recuperar su conexión con la Fuerza. Encarnando a este Jedi, te encontrarás enfrentado a la decisión más terrible de la galaxia: Seguir el lado luminoso o sucumbir a la oscuridad... Características principales:   Continuación del aclamado y original Star Wars® Knights of the Old Republic™.
   Escoge entre tres clases diferentes de Jedi, cada cual con acceso a habilidades Jedi específicas.
   Elige el lado luminoso u oscuro de la Fuerza según progresas a lo largo de la historia. 
   Las elecciones que hagas afectarán a tu personaje, a quienes estén en tu grupo y a quienes puedan unirse a ti en tu búsqueda.

Cinq années après les évènements du récompensé Star Wars® Knights of the Old Republic™, les seigneurs Sith ont placé les Jedi au bord de l'extinction et sont sur le point d'écraser l'Ancienne République. Avec l'Ordre Jedi en ruines, le seul espoir de la République est un Jedi isolé, aux abois pour se remettre en phase avec la Force. En tenant le rôle de ce Jedi, vous ferez face à la décision la plus grave de la galaxie : suivre la lumière ou succombez pour le côté obscur… Caractéristiques :   Suite de jeu original et acclamé Star Wars® Knights of the Old Republic™. 
   Faites votre choix parmi trois classes différentes de Jedi, chacune ayant accès à des aptitudes Jedi spécifiques.
   Choisissez la lumière ou le côté obscur de la Force au fur et à mesure de votre progression dans l'histoire.
   Les choix que vous ferez affecteront votre personnage, ceux dans votre partie et ceux qui peuvent vous rejoindre dans votre quête.

Fünf Jahre nach den Ereignissen des preisgekrönten Star Wars® Knights of the Old Republic™ haben die Sith Lords die Jedi bis zum Rande der Ausrottung gejagt und sind kurz vor der Zerstörung der alten Republik. Mit den Jedi am Abgrund ist die einzige Hoffung der Republik ein einsamer Jedi, der darum kämpft sich wieder mit der Macht zu verbinden. Als dieser Jedi werden Sie mit der schwierigsten Entscheidung der Galaxie konfrontiert: Der hellen Seite der Macht zu folgen oder der dunklen zu verfallen... Hauptmerkmale:   Nachfolger des bejubelten und originalen Star Wars®Knights of the Old Republic™. 
   Wählen Sie aus 3 Jedi-Klassen, jede mit spezifischen Fähigkeiten.
   Wählen Sie die helle oder die dunkle Seite der Macht und kämpfen Sie sich durch die Geschichte.
   Ihre Entscheidungen beeinflussen nicht nur Ihren Charakter, sondern auch Ihre Mitstreiter.

Five years after the events from the award winning Star Wars® Knights of the Old Republic™,  the Sith Lords have hunted the Jedi to the edge of extinction and are on the verge of crushing the Old Republic.  With the Jedi Order in ruin, the Republic’s only hope is a lone Jedi struggling to reconnect with the Force.  As this Jedi, you will be faced with the galaxy’s most dire decision:  Follow the light side or succumb to the dark… Key Features:   Follow up to the acclaimed and original Star Wars®  Knights of the Old Republic™. 
   Choose from three different classes of Jedi, each with access to specific Jedi abilities.
   Choose the light or the dark side of the Force as you progress through the story.  
   The choices you make will affect your character, those in your party and those who may join you in your quest.

Five years after the events from the award winning Star Wars® Knights of the Old Republic™,  the Sith Lords have hunted the Jedi to the edge of extinction and are on the verge of crushing the Old Republic.  With the Jedi Order in ruin, the Republic’s only hope is a lone Jedi struggling to reconnect with the Force.  As this Jedi, you will be faced with the galaxy’s most dire decision:  Follow the light side or succumb to the dark… Key Features:   Follow up to the acclaimed and original Star Wars®  Knights of the Old Republic™. 
   Choose from three different classes of Jedi, each with access to specific Jedi abilities.
   Choose the light or the dark side of the Force as you progress through the story.  
   The choices you make will affect your character, those in your party and those who may join you in your quest.

"Cinque anni dopo dopo gli eventi narrati nel pluripremiato Star Wars® I Cavalieri della Vecchia Repubblica™, i Signori dei Sith hanno portato gli Jedi al limite dell’estinzione e sono sul punto di abbattere la Vecchia Repubblica. Con l’Ordine Jedi in rovina, l’unica speranza della Repubblica è uno Jedi solitario che sta cercando di riconnettersi alla Forza. Nei panni di questo Jedi, dovrai prendere la più delicata decisione per la galassia: Seguire il lato luminoso della Forza o cedere al suo lato oscuro...
 
Funzionalità chiave:
 
Espansione dell’acclamato e originale Star Wars® I Cavalieri della Vecchia Repubblica™. 
 
Scegli tra tre diverse classi di Jedi, ciascuna con accesso ad abilità Jedi specifiche.
 
Scegli il Lato Luminoso o il Lato Oscuro della Forza mentre procedi nella storia. 
 
Le scelte che farai influenzeranno il tuo personaggio, i tuoi alleati e chiunque si unisca alla tua causa."

As this Jedi, you will be faced with the galaxy’s most dire decision:  Follow the light side or succumb to the dark… Key Features:   Follow up to the acclaimed and original Star Wars®  Knights of the Old Republic™.

game.title: Jet Set Radio
game.description:
Tag, grind, and trick to the beat in SEGA’s hit game Jet Set Radio!
 
 Fight for control of Tokyo-to, mark your turf with graffiti, tag walls, billboards, and even rival gang members! Perform tricks and flips on magnetically driven in-line skates, but watch out for the local police force! Key Features:    Heritage Collection treatment: 
 
 Now available via PC Digital download, Jet Set Radio is part of Sega’s Heritage Collection series and now features lush HD visuals, developer interviews, and amazing fan-created graffiti.
 
    Classic Beats: 
 
 Skate to the funky tunes of Pirate Radio! Jet Set Radio still features 29 of 30 tracks from the original Dreamcast release.
 
    Express yourself: 
 
 Choose from a massive catalog of classic and new graffiti or create your own and use it to tag walls, billboards, cars, and even rival gang members!
 
    The gang’s all here: 
 
 Recruit more than 10 playable characters to your gang, each with their own unique graffiti!

    The gang’s all here:

Marca, grinda y haz trucos con ritmo en el éxito de SEGA, Jet Set Radio. 
 
 Lucha por el control de Tokyo-to, grafitea para marcar tu territorio, firma paredes, carteleras ¡y hasta a los miembros de la banda rival! Realiza trucos y giros con tablas magnéticas, ¡pero ten cuidado con la policía! Características principales:    Tratamiento Heritage Collection: 
 
 Jet Set Radio forma parte de la serie Heritage Collection de Sega y ahora incluye gráficos en alta definición, entrevistas con los desarrolladores e increíbles grafitis creados por los aficionados.
 
    Ritmos clásicos: 
 
 ¡Patina mientras escuchas la música funky de Pirate Radio! Jet Set Radio conserva 29 de las 30 canciones de la edición original para Dreamcast.
 
    Exprésate: 
 
 Elige de entre un amplísimo catálogo de grafitis clásicos y nuevos o crea tus propios grafitis para dejar tu firma en paredes, carteleras, coches, ¡o incluso en los miembros de otras bandas!
 
    Toda la banda está aquí: 
 
 Consigue más de 10 personajes controlables para tu banda. ¡Cada uno tiene sus grafitis exclusivos!

Taguez et enchaînez en rythme grinds et autres figures dans Jet Set Radio, le jeu culte de SEGA !
 
 Battez-vous pour dominer Tokyo-to, marquez votre territoire à l'aide de graffitis, taguez les murs, les panneaux d'affichage et même les membres des gangs rivaux ! Réalisez des figures et des flips avec vos rollers, mais méfiez-vous des forces de police ! Caractéristiques :    Remis au goût du jour par la collection Heritage : 
 
 Maintenant disponible en téléchargement numérique sur PC, Jet Set Radio fait partie des titres de la collection Heritage de Sega et inclut à présent des graphismes HD riches en détails, des interviews avec les développeurs et des graffitis incroyables réalisés par les fans.
 
    Des rythmes classiques : 
 
 Faites du roller sur les titres funky de la radio pirate ! Jet Set Radio a gardé 29 des 30 morceaux du jeu original sur Dreamcast.
 
    Exprimez votre créativité : 
 
 Faites votre choix dans un catalogue impressionnant de graffitis classiques et inédits ou créez-en vous-mêmes, puis taguez les murs, les panneaux d'affichage, les voitures et même les membres de gangs rivaux !
 
    Le gang est réuni : 
 
 Recrutez plus de 10 personnages jouables dans votre gang, chacun possédant ses propres graffitis !

Taggen, grinden und führen Sie coole Tricks aus zum Beat in SEGAs Toptitel „Jet Set Radio“. 
 
 Kämpfen Sie um die Macht in Tokyo-to, markieren Sie Ihr Revier mit Graffitis, hinterlassen Sie Ihren Tag auf Mauern, Plakatwänden und sogar auf den Mitgliedern der rivalisierenden Gang! Zeigen Sie auf magnetisch betriebenen Inlinern, was Sie an Tricks und Flips draufhaben, aber passen Sie auf, dass Sie nicht der Polizei in die Quere kommen! Key Features:    Heritage Collection: 
 
 Jet Set Radio ist ab sofort als Download über PC Digital verfügbar und gehört jetzt zu Segas Heritage Collection-Serie mit gestochen scharfer HD-Grafik, Entwickler-Interviews und tollen Fan-Graffitis.
 
    Klassische Beats: 
 
 Skaten Sie zum Piratensender-Groove! Jet Set Radio beinhaltet 29 der 30 Tracks des Original-Dreamcast-Spiels.
 
    Zeigen Sie, wer Sie sind: 
 
 Wählen Sie aus einem gigantischen Katalog klassischer und neuer Graffitis oder erstellen Sie Ihre eigenen und hinterlassen Sie Ihren Tag auf Mauern, Plakatwänden, Autos und sogar gegnerischen Gangmitgliedern!
 
    Die Gang ist bereit: 
 
 Rekrutieren Sie über 10 spielbare Charaktere für Ihre Gang - alle mit individuellen, einzigartigen Graffitis!

    Beat classici: 
 
 Sfreccia sul tuo skate al ritmo funky di Pirate Radio! Jet Set Radio include 29 delle 30 tracce presenti nella versione Dreamcast originale.

 Scegli in un immenso catalogo di graffiti classici e moderni, oppure crea i tuoi personali per marchiare i muri, i manifesti, le auto e persino i membri delle gang rivali!
 
    La gang è tornata:

game.title: Palworld
game.description: Palworld is a multiplayer, open-world survival crafting game where you can befriend and collect mysterious creatures called "Pal" in a vast world! Make your Pals fight, build, farm, and work in factories.

localized_description.text: Palworld is a multiplayer, open-world survival crafting game where you can befriend and collect mysterious creatures called "Pal" in a vast world! Make your Pals fight, build, farm, and work in factories.

game.title: Disco Elysium
game.description: Disco Elysium is a role-playing game developed and published by ZA/UM. It is set in the fictional city of Revachol, where players assume the role of an amnesiac detective investigating a murder case. The game emphasises dialogue and skill-based choices, with character attributes represented by internal voices that influence decisions and interactions. Its narrative explores themes of politics, philosophy, and personal identity, and it is known for its unconventional gameplay and deep storytelling.

localized_description.text: Disco Elysium is a role-playing game developed and published by ZA/UM. It is set in the fictional city of Revachol, where players assume the role of an amnesiac detective investigating a murder case. The game emphasises dialogue and skill-based choices, with character attributes represented by internal voices that influence decisions and interactions. Its narrative explores themes of politics, philosophy, and personal identity, and it is known for its unconventional gameplay and deep storytelling.

Disco Elysium: The Final Cut is an enhanced edition of the original role-playing game developed and published by ZA/UM. It retains the core gameplay and narrative while adding full voice acting, new quests, additional endings, and other narrative revisions.

Disco Elysium is a stylish open-world role playing game where it's up to you to decide what sort of detective you want to be.

After waking up in a trashed hostel room with a hangover and no memory of his past, follow a detective trying to piece his life back together while investigating a murder in the town of Revachol.

After initially appearing to be an open and close case, it soon transpires this murder has triggered a chain of events that has wider implications on the city and its inhabitants.

​Death, sex, taxes, and disco – nothing is off the table. Revachol is a real place with real challenges. Solve the massive murder investigation or relax and kick back with sprawling side-cases.

The detective decides - the citizens abide.

Its narrative explores themes of politics, philosophy, and personal identity, and it is known for its unconventional gameplay and deep storytelling.

game.title: House Flipper
game.description: House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

localized_description.text: 《房产达人》是个能让你成为一人房屋翻新团队的独特机会。购买、整修、升级破损的房屋，赋予它们新的生命，并以更高的价格卖出！

House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

在您购买第一处房产之前，您必须想办法获得一些启动资金。不过不用担心！ 幸运的是，有很多工作触手可及！接受附近居民的任务 —— 清洁房屋、粉刷墙壁、安装暖气片、淋浴和空调，甚至为他们的房屋布置家具！ 一旦客户为您的辛勤工作付了钱，你就可以购买属于自己的房子了。
 
      
 
 拿起你的锤子！粗鲁地推倒一些墙壁！清除碎玻璃碎片、垃圾和废弃家具，为彻底将房屋改头换面做好准备！你可以满足买家的每一个要求，你也可以将房屋布置成一个舒适的办公室来发展你的业务，怎么去做取决于你自己。
 
      
 
 幸运的是你并不孤单。 最值得信赖的工具就在这里！在您的油漆滚筒、窗户清洁剂、石膏工具、拖把、锤子，当然还有强大的平板电脑的帮助下，没有任何装修任务会吓到您！使用这些工具还可以为您提供经验，你将可以升级它们并磨练您的技能，使您的工作更加愉快。
 
      
 
 无论您是打算建造梦想中的房子、帮助居民进行翻修还是单纯地喜欢破坏东西，这些都无关紧要 ——《房产达人》将帮助您放松心情。 坐下来，忘掉日常烦恼，沉浸在《房产达人》的世界中吧！

購買你的第一項房產前，先需要賺到足夠的錢。不必擔心，幸好有不少的工作！接受來自鄰里的任務：清潔他們的房屋、將牆壁塗油漆、安裝暖氣、淋浴間或冷氣、甚至布置整個房產。滿意的客戶會向你提供不錯的報酬，而你會逐漸地接近買自己的房子的目標。
 
      
 
 拿起鎚子！是時候讓自己有點骯髒，並且拆掉幾張牆壁。處理碎玻璃、垃圾、剩下的家具部件，並且準備全面改造的空間。想要達到個別客戶的所有要求還是為自己做一間十分適合自營的，舒適的辦公室，由你決定。
 
      
 
 幸好，你並不孤單。油漆滾筒、玻璃刮水器、漆刀、拖把、鎚子與可靠的平板電腦......在最忠心耿耿夥伴：即工具的幫助下，任何任務都不可怕。使用它們讓你獲得經驗以便使你的工作更加愉快。
 
      
 
 不管你打算建設夢想裡的房屋，幫助居民翻新房子還是搗毀些甚麼，《房產達人》幫你放鬆。舒服地坐下，忘記日常的煩惱，並且埋頭《房產達人》世界！

You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. 
 No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! 
 Take job offers from nearby residents - clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! 
 Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.
 
 
      
 
 Grab your hammer! It's time to take a bit of a rude approach and knock some walls down! 
 Get rid of broken glass shards, litter, and leftover pieces of furniture, to prepare the place for a complete makeover! 
 It's up to you to either meet every single requirement of specific buyers or make yourself a cozy office to grow your business in.
 
      
 
 Fortunately, you're not alone. The set of your trustiest tools is here with ya! 
 With the help of your paint roller, window cleaner, plaster tool, mop, hammer, and of course, the mighty tablet, no renovation will scare you! 
 Using those tools also gives you experience, which can be used to upgrade them and polish your skills, making your work even more pleasant.
 
      
 
 Regardless if you plan to create the house of your dreams, help the residents with their renovations or feel the need to smack some walls - 
 House Flipper is here for You! So just sit comfortably, let go off your usual daily routine, and delve into the world of House Flipper... into your world!

Antes de poder adquirir tu primera propiedad, debes ganártela. 
 No te preocupes, ¡por suerte hay mucho que hacer! Acepta ofertas de trabajo de los residentes: 
 limpia sus casas, pinta las paredes, instala calefacción, duchas y aire acondicionado, e incluso amuebla propiedades enteras. 
 Si los clientes quedan satisfechos recompensarán bien tu trabajo y cada vez estarás más cerca de comprar tu propia casa.
 
      
 
 ¡Martillo en mano! Es hora de ensuciarse un poco y tirar algunas paredes. 
 Deshazte de los trozos de vidrio, la basura, los restos de muebles y prepara el espacio para una metamorfosis completa. 
 De ti depende si quieres cumplir todos los requisitos de los compradores o prefieres organizar una oficina acogedora, 
 perfecta para administrar tu propio negocio.
 
      
 
 Por suerte, no estás solo. Un rodillo de pintura, un limpiacristales, una espátula, una fregona, un martillo y una tableta... 
 Con ayuda de tus compañeros más fieles, las herramientas, ningún pedido será terrible. 
 Con ellas podrás ganar experiencia y desarrollar habilidades, lo que hará que tu trabajo sea aún más agradable.
 
      
 
 No importa si planeas crear la casa de tus sueños, ayudar a los residentes con sus reformas o romper algo, 
 House Flipper te ayudará a relajarte. 
 ¡Siéntate, olvídeate de las preocupaciones diarias y sumérjete en el mundo de House Flipper!

Vous devrez économiser un peu avant de pouvoir acheter votre première propriété. Mais pas d'inquiétudes ! 
 Vous avez accès à de nombreuses missions ! Acceptez les contrats de vos voisins - nettoyez, peignez, installez, et meublez leur propriété ! 
 Une fois que vos clients vous auront payé pour votre dur labeur, vous pourrez acheter votre propre maison.
 
      
 
 Prenez un marteau ! Il est temps de vous défouler et de détruire quelques murs ! 
 Débarrassez-vous des débris de verre, des détritus et des vieux meubles, et préparez l'endroit pour une rénovation complète ! 
 À vous de décider si vous voulez vous plier à toutes les exigences des acheteurs, 
 ou si vous voulez vous concevoir un bureau confortable pour vous développer encore plus.
 
      
 
 Heureusement, vous n'êtes pas seul. Vous êtes accompagné d'un ensemble d'outils très fiables ! 
 Avec l'aide d'un rouleau de peinture, d'un lave-vitre, de plâtre, d'un balai, d'un marteau, 
 et bien sûr, d'une tablette, aucune rénovation ne vous fera reculer ! 
 Utiliser ces outils augmentera votre expérience, qui vous permettra de les améliorer, eux et vos compétences, rendant la tâche plus agréable.
 
      
 
 Que vous vouliez créer la maison de vos rêves, aider vos voisins à rénover leur maison, ou démolir quelques murs - House Flipper est là pour vous ! 
 Alors asseyez-vous confortablement, abandonnez votre routine habituelle, 
 et plongez dans le monde de House Flipper… dans votre monde !

Du musst dir hier zuerst einen Namen machen, bevor du deine erste Immobilie kaufen kannst. 
 Aber mach dir keine Sorgen, denn zum Glück gibt es hier mehr Arbeit als genug! 
 Nimm Jobangebote von Einwohnern in der Umgebung an - Reinigungen, Wände anstreichen, Heizungen, 
 Duschen und Klimaanlagen installieren oder sogar ganze Immobilien möblieren! 
 Sobald die dankbaren Kunden deine zuverlässige Arbeit bezahlt haben, kannst du dir ein eigenes Haus kaufen.
 
      
 
 Schnapp dir deinen Hammer, denn wir werden hart zuschlagen und ein paar Mauern zerstören! 
 Entsorge Glasscherben, Abfälle und Möbelreste, um die Immobilie auf eine Runderneuerung vorzubereiten! 
 Du musst dich entscheiden, ob du allen Bedingungen bestimmter Käufer nachkommen 
 oder dein eigenes gemütliches Büro bauen möchtest, damit dein Geschäft wachsen kann.
 
      
 
 Glücklicherweise bist du nicht alleine, denn du hast deine treuen Werkzeuge dabei! 
 Dank deiner Farbroller, Fensterputzer, Putzwerkzeuge, Wischer, Hammer - und natürlich - 
 dem mächtigen Tablet, bist du jeder Renovierung gewachsen! 
 Diese Werkzeuge bringen dir auch Erfahrungspunkte ein, damit du sie und deine Fähigkeiten verbessern kannst. 
 Dadurch wird deine Arbeit noch angenehmer.
 
      
 
 Egal ob du das Haus deiner Träume bauen, den Einwohnern bei ihren Renovierungen helfen 
 oder ein paar Wände zerstören möchtest - House Flipper ist immer für dich da! 
 Lehn dich also zurück, lass deine täglichen Routinen hinter dir und tauche in die Welt von House Flipper ein ... deiner Welt!

Para poder comprar o teu primeiro imóvel precisas ganhar um pouco de dinheiro. 
 Não te preocupes - felizmente, há muito trabalho para ti! Aceita as ofertas de emprego dos residentes da zona 
 - limpa as suas casas, pinta as paredes, faz a instalação de aquecimento, do sistema de duche ou de ar condicionado ou, 
 até mesmo, mobília casas inteiras. Os clientes satisfeitos pagaram bem pelo teu trabalho e tu, 
 com cada cheque de pagamento, estarás mais perto de comprar a tua própria casa.
 
      
 
 Apanha o martelo! Chegou a hora de te sujar e derrubar umas paredes. 
 Tira os pedaços de vidro, lixo, restos de móveis e prepara o espaço para uma metamorfose completa.
 
      
 
 Felizmente, não estás sozinho. O teu rolo de pintura, o limpa-vidros, a espátula, a esfregona, o martelo e o táblete que nunca falha... 
 Com a ajuda dos companheiros mais leais, ou seja, as tuas ferramentas, nenhum trabalho será difícil. 
 Ao usá-los ganharás experiência e melhorarás as habilidades e, assim, o teu trabalho vai tornar-se ainda mais agradável.
 
      
 
 Não importa se estás a pensar em criar a casa dos teus sonhos, ajudas os residentes a realizar renovações ou, 
 simplesmente, sentes vontade de arrebentar alguma coisa - 
 o House Flipper vai ajudar-te a relaxar. Senta-te, esqueça as tuas preocupações diárias e mergulha no mundo do House Flipper!

最初の財産を買う前に、あなたは必要なお金を稼がなければならない。
 心配しないで、儲けるチャンスは幾らでもある！例えば、地元住民からの仕事を受け入れる手がある：
 彼らの家を掃除したり、壁を塗ったり、暖房やシャワーやエアコンなど設置したりして、物件全体を整える事もあるだろう。
 満足された依頼人はあなたの働きに十分に報いるだろうから、あなたが段々自分の家を買うことに近づく。
 
      
 
 ハンマーを手に！壁数枚を壊しましょう。ガラスの破片とゴミ、家具のスクラップなどを取り除き、完全なリフォームに向けてスペースを準備する。
 個々の依頼人のすべての要件を満たしすか、あなた自身のビジネスを運営するのに最適な居心地の良いオフィスを手配したいのかはあなた次第だ。
 
      
 
 幸いなことに、あなたは一人ではない。ペイントローラーやウィンドウウォッシャー、パテナイフにモップとハンマー、そして頼もしいタブレット...　
 その全てがあなたの信用できる戦友であるツールだ。その助けがあれば、どんな注文でも問題なく完成できる。
 道具を使用すれば、経験を積み、スキルを磨くことができ、仕事が楽しくなる一方。
 
      
 
 夢の家を作ることを図っているのか、入居者をリフォームに助けたいのか、単に何かを壊したいのかは関係ない!
 『House Flipper』はあなたにリラックスさせるに違いない。
 腰を掛けて、毎日の悩みを忘れ、「House Flipper」の世界に没頭しよう！

You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. 
 No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! 
 Take job offers from nearby residents - clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! 
 Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.
 
 
      
 
 Grab your hammer! It's time to take a bit of a rude approach and knock some walls down! 
 Get rid of broken glass shards, litter, and leftover pieces of furniture, to prepare the place for a complete makeover! 
 It's up to you to either meet every single requirement of specific buyers or make yourself a cozy office to grow your business in.
 
      
 
 Fortunately, you're not alone. The set of your trustiest tools is here with ya! 
 With the help of your paint roller, window cleaner, plaster tool, mop, hammer, and of course, the mighty tablet, no renovation will scare you! 
 Using those tools also gives you experience, which can be used to upgrade them and polish your skills, making your work even more pleasant.
 
      
 
 Regardless if you plan to create the house of your dreams, help the residents with their renovations or feel the need to smack some walls - 
 House Flipper is here for You! So just sit comfortably, let go off your usual daily routine, and delve into the world of House Flipper... into your world!

Du skal gøre dig fortjent til det, før du køber din første ejendom. Ingen bekymringer dog! 
  Heldigvis er der masser af arbejde lige ved hånden! Tag jobtilbud fra beboere i nærheden - 
  ryd op, mal vægge, installer varmeapparater, brusere og klimaanlæg, eller indret hele deres ejendom! 
  Når de taknemmelige kunder har betalt dig for dit solide arbejde, er det tid til at få dit eget hus.
  
       
  Tag din hammer! Det er tid til at benytte en hårdhændet tilgang og smadre nogle vægge! 
  Slip af med glasskår, affald og rester af møbler for at forberede stedet til en komplet makeover! 
  Det er op til dig enten at opfylde hvert enkelt krav fra bestemte købere eller lave dig selv til et hyggeligt kontor at vokse din virksomhed i.
  
       
  Heldigvis er du ikke alene. Sættet med dine mest pålidelige værktøjer er med dig! 
  Ved hjælp af malerulle, vinduespudser, gips værktøj, moppe, hammer og selvfølgelig den mægtige tablet vil ingen renovering skræmme dig! 
  Brug af disse værktøjer giver dig også erfaring, som kan bruges til at opgradere dem og polere dine færdigheder, hvilket gør dit arbejde endnu mere behageligt.
  
       
  Det er ligegyldigt, om du planlægger at oprette dit drømmehus, hjælpe beboere med renoveringer, eller om du vil smadre noget - 
  House Flipper hjælper dig med at slappe af. 
  Læn dig tilbage, glem hverdagens bekymringer og fordyb dig i en verden af House Flipper!

Per fortuna, non sei solo. Un rullo per pittori, un lavavetri, una spatola, una scopa, un martello e un tablet affidabile ... 
  Con l'aiuto dei compagni più fedeli - strumenti - nessun ordine sarà terribile. 
  Usarli ti permetterà di acquisire esperienza e sviluppare abilità, che renderanno il tuo lavoro ancora più piacevole.
  
       
  Martello in mano! È ora di sporcarsi un po' e abbattere qualche muro. 
  Sbarazzati di schegge di vetro, spazzatura, avanzi di mobili e prepara lo spazio per una metamorfosi completa. 
  Sta a te se vuoi soddisfare tutte le esigenze dei singoli acquirenti o 
  preferisci organizzarti un ufficio accogliente, perfetto per gestire la tua attività.
  
       
  Per fortuna, non sei solo. Un rullo per pittori, un lavavetri, una spatola, una scopa, un martello e un tablet affidabile ... 
  Con l'aiuto dei compagni più fedeli - strumenti - nessun ordine sarà terribile. 
  Usarli ti permetterà di acquisire esperienza e sviluppare abilità, che renderanno il tuo lavoro ancora più piacevole.
  
       
  Non importa se hai intenzione di creare la casa dei tuoi sogni, aiutare i residenti con 
  i lavori di ristrutturazione o se vuoi rompere qualcosa - House Flipper ti aiuterà a rilassarti. 
  Accomodati, dimentica le preoccupazioni quotidiane e immergiti nel mondo di House Flipper!

game.brief: House Flipper is a unique chance to become the one-man renovating crew. You've got to earn it around here before you purchase your first property. No worries though! Luckily, there's plenty of work at your fingertips! Take job offers from nearby residents to clean up, paint walls, install heaters, showers, and air conditioners, or even furnish their whole property! Once the grateful clients pay you for your solid work, it's time to get your own house.

game.title: Divinity: Original Sin II
game.description:
Divinity: Original Sin II is a single- and multiplayer top-down, party-based role-playing game with pen & paper RPG-like levels of freedom. It features turn-based combat, a strong focus on systematic gameplay and a well-grounded narrative.

The Divine is dead. The Void approaches. And the powers lying dormant within you are soon to awaken. The battle for Divinity has begun. Choose wisely and trust sparingly; darkness lurks within every heart.

game.title: Portal
game.description: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

localized_description.text: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.
《传送门》（Portal）是一款由Valve所开发的第一人称射击/解谜游戏，于2007年与半条命2三部曲（HL2、HL2EP1、HL2EP2)《军团要塞2》游戏一起捆绑于橙盒(The Orange Box)上市，另外也有Xbox 360以及PS3的版本。游戏使用Source引擎。游戏的特色是不寻常的逻辑思考部份，玩家必须解决一些棘手及有趣的逻辑问题才能得到过关的方法

Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

Portal's plot is revealed to the player via audio messages or "announcements" from GLaDOS and visual elements inside rooms found in later levels. According to The Final Hours of Portal 2, the year is established to be "somewhere in 2010"—twelve years after Aperture Science has been abandoned.

The game begins with Chell waking up from a stasis bed and hearing instructions and warnings from GLaDOS, an artificial intelligence, about upcoming tests. Chell enters into distinct chambers that introduce players to the game's mechanics, sequentially. GLaDOS's announcements serve as instructions to Chell and help the player progress through the game, but also develops the atmosphere and characterizes the AI as a person.[4] Chell is promised cake as her reward if she completes all test chambers.[19]

Chell proceeds through the empty Enrichment Center, with GLaDOS as her only interaction. As the player nears completion, GLaDOS's motives and behavior turn more sinister; although she is designed to appear encouraging, GLaDOS's actions and speech suggest insincerity and callous disregard for the safety and well-being of the test subjects. The test chambers become increasingly dangerous as Chell proceeds, tests including a live-fire course designed for military androids, as well as some chambers flooded with a hazardous liquid. In another chamber, GLaDOS notes the importance of the Weighted Companion Cube, a waist-high crate with a single large pink heart on each face, for helping Chell to complete the test. However, GLaDOS declares it must be euthanized in an "emergency intelligence incinerator" before Chell can continue.[17] Some later chambers include automated turrets with childlike voices (also voiced by McLain) that fire at Chell, only to sympathize with her after being destroyed or disabled.[20][21]

After Chell completes the final test chamber, GLaDOS maneuvers Chell into an incinerator in an attempt to kill her. Chell escapes with the portal gun and makes her way through the maintenance areas within the Enrichment Center.[22] GLaDOS panics and insists that she was pretending to kill Chell as part of testing. GLaDOS then asks Chell to assume the "party escort submission position", lying face-first on the ground, so that a "party associate" can take her to her reward, but Chell continues her escape. In this section, GLaDOS communes with Chell as it becomes clear the AI had killed everyone else in the center.[11][12] Chell makes her way through the maintenance areas and empty office spaces behind the chambers, sometimes following graffiti messages which point in the right direction. These backstage areas, which are in an extremely dilapidated state, stand in stark contrast to the pristine test chambers. The graffiti includes statements such as "the cake is a lie", and pastiches of Emily Dickinson's poem "The Chariot", Henry Wadsworth Longfellow's "The Reaper and the Flowers", and Emily Brontë's "No Coward Soul Is Mine", referring to and mourning the death of the Companion Cube.[4]

GLaDOS attempts to dissuade Chell with threats of physical harm and misleading statements as Chell makes her way deeper into the maintenance areas. Chell reaches a large chamber where GLaDOS's hardware hangs overhead. GLaDOS continues to threaten Chell, but during the exchange, a sphere falls off of GLaDOS and Chell drops it in an incinerator. GLaDOS reveals that Chell has just destroyed the morality core or her conscience, one of the multiple "personality cores" that Aperture Science employees installed after the AI flooded the enrichment center with neurotoxin gas. With it removed, she can access its emitters again. A six-minute countdown starts as Chell dislodges and incinerates more of GLaDOS' personality cores, while GLaDOS discourages her both verbally, with taunts and juvenile insults, and physically by firing rockets at her. After Chell destroys the last personality core, a malfunction tears the room apart and transports everything to the surface. Chell is then seen lying outside the facility's gates amid the remains of GLaDOS. Following the announcement of Portal 2, the ending was expanded in a later update. In this retroactive continuity, Chell is dragged away from the scene by an unseen entity speaking in a robotic voice, thanking her for assuming the "party escort submission position".[15][23]

The final scene, after a long and speedy zoom through the bowels of the facility, shows a Black Forest cake,[24] and the Weighted Companion Cube, surrounded by a mix of shelves containing dozens of apparently inactive personality cores. The cores begin to light up, before a robotic arm descends and extinguishes the candle on the cake, causing the room to blackout.[25] As the credits roll, GLaDOS delivers a concluding report: the song "Still Alive", which declares the experiment to be a huge success, as well as serving to indicate to the player that GLaDOS is still alive,[26] that her "happy" core was not disabled.

Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay.
 
					The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation.
 
					Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Portal™ es la nueva aventura para un solo jugador de Valve. Ambientado en los misteriosos laboratorios de Aperture Science, Portal ha sido calificado como uno de los juegos más innovadores de los últimos tiempos y ofrece incontables horas de rompecabezas nunca vistos.
 

 
					El juego está diseñado para cambiar radicalmente el modo en que los jugadores enfocan, sopesan y reaccionan a las circunstancias en un entorno determinado, al igual que la pistola antigravedad abrió un nuevo mundo de posibilidades a la hora de manipular objetos.
 

 
					Los jugadores deben resolver rompecabezas y desafíos basados en las leyes físicas abriendo portales y desplazando objetos, o incluso sus propios avatares, a través del espacio.

Portal™ est un nouveau jeu solo signé Valve. Avec pour décor les mystérieux laboratoires Aperture Science, Portal s'impose par son côté innovant et garantit aux joueurs un gameplay et une longévité à toute épreuve.
 

 
					Le jeu a été conçu pour amener les joueurs à repenser la façon dont ils abordent et envisagent les possibilités d'un environnement donné, un peu comme le pistolet anti-gravité de Half-Life® 2 avait en son temps innové en proposant de nouvelles manières de tirer parti d'un objet dans une situation précise.
 

 
					Le joueur doit résoudre des énigmes et relever différents défis en ouvrant des portails afin de manipuler des objets et de se déplacer lui-même dans l'espace.

Portal™ ist ein neues Valve-Spiel im Einzelspielermodus. Portal, dessen Handlung in den geheimnisvollen Aperture Science Laboratories spielt, gilt als eines der innovativsten Spiele überhaupt und bietet Spielern viele Stunden voller einzigartiger Spielunterhaltung.
 
Die Spieler dieses Spiels können die Möglichkeiten einer gegebenen Umgebung auf eine völlig neue Weise ausschöpfen, so wie das Gravitron in Half-Life® 2 neue Möglichkeiten der Nutzung eines Objekts in verschiedenen Situationen bietet.
 
Die Spieler müssen mit zwei Portalen Rätsel lösen, sich Herausforderungen stellen und auf diese Weise verschiedene Objekte – und sich selbst – bewegen.

O Portal™ é um novo jogo da Valve para um jogador. Passado nos misteriosos Laboratórios Aperture Science, Portal é considerado um dos jogos mais inovadores do horizonte e irá proporcionar aos jogadores horas de jogo sem igual.
 

 
O jogo foi concebido para alterar a forma como os jogadores abordam, manipulam e avaliam as possibilidades num dado ambiente; comparável à forma como a Arma Antigravidade do Half-Life 2 inovou as possibilidades de tirar partido de um objeto em qualquer situação.
 

 
Os jogadores têm de resolver quebra-cabeças físicos e desafios abrindo portais para manobrar objetos, e a si próprios, pelo espaço.

Portal™ er et nyt singleplayer-spil fra Valve. Portal, der udspiller sig i det mystiske Aperture Science Laboratories, er blevet kaldt et af de mest innovative nye spil i vente og vil byde gamere på mange timers unikt gameplay.
 

 
Spillet er designet til at ændre den måde, hvorpå spillere tackler, manipulerer og gisner om mulighederne i et givent område - i stil med, hvordan Half-Life® 2's Tyngdekraftvåben skabte nye måder at udnytte objekter på i en given situation.
 

 
Spillere skal løse fysiske gåder og udfordringer ved at åbne portaler, som tillader dem at teleportere både objekter og sig selv gennem et rum.

Portal™ è un nuovo gioco per giocatore singolo di Valve. Ambientato nei misteriosi laboratori di Aperture Science, Portal è stato giudicato uno dei titoli più innovativi del momento e offre ore di giocabilità unica.
 

 
					Il gioco è progettato per modificare le modalità di approccio, manipolazione e analisi delle possibilità all'interno di un dato ambiente, proprio come la pistola gravitazionale di Half-Life® 2 ha innovato i modi di sfruttare gli oggetti in ogni situazione.
 

 
					I giocatori devono risolvere rompicapo fisici aprendo portali, in modo da trasportare nello spazio se stessi o altri oggetti.

《传送门》是一款由Valve所开发的第一人称平台解谜游戏，于2007年10月9日与《半条命2：第二章》、《军团要塞2》等游戏一起装置于《橙盒》游戏包上市，可以在Windows、Xbox 360与PlayStation 3三种平台上运行。除了购买《橙盒》外，玩家也可以透过Steam在线服务购买该游戏，或是在2008年4月9日后直接购买该游戏的独立零售版本。2008年10月22日，一个名为《传送门：仍然活着》（英语：Portal: Still Alive）的独立版本在Xbox Live Arcade中发布。在2010年5月12日，Valve成功将Steam平台移植到Mac OS X，并且将该游戏移植到Mac OS X。2013年Valve将游戏移植到Linux系统中，5月2日发布beta版，7月24日发布正式版本。2014年5月12日，发布基于Nvidia Shield解决方案的Android版本。

该游戏以一连串的解谜难关组成，玩家必须利用手中的“光圈科学手持传送门装置”（简称为传送枪）打造传送门，为自己开条到出口的路。该游戏只有两个人物，一个是主角，名为雪儿（英语：Chell），另一个是名为GLaDOS（Generic Lifeform and Disk Operating System，通用生命体与磁盘操作系统）的人工智能。游戏内的难关全部由GLaDOS所设置。GLaDOS宣称，只要主角能解开所有的谜团（“完成测试”），就可以获得蛋糕。该游戏的创作概念源自一群迪吉彭理工学院学生开发的解谜游戏《Narbacular Drop》，后来这些学生被维尔福雇用，而《传送门》就是他们日后的创作结晶。

虽然该游戏的剧情长度很短，但该游戏依然被认为是2007年最出色的游戏之一。该游戏独特的玩法以及黑色幽默的剧情普遍获得评论家赞赏，另外很多评论家也特别赞赏游戏对于GLaDOS的角色塑造与片尾曲《仍然活着(Still Alive)》。由于该游戏很受到玩家的欢迎，维尔福也推出一系列的相关商品，许多玩家也自制游戏内的蛋糕与相关物品。

续作《传送门2》已于2011年4月18日推出。

game.brief: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

game.title: Baldur's Gate 3
game.description:
An ancient evil has returned to Baldur's Gate, intent on devouring it from the inside out. The fate of Faerun lies in your hands. Alone, you may resist. But together, you can overcome.

The land of Faerûn is in turmoil. Refugees cross the wilds, fleeing the helltorn stronghold of Elturel. A vicious cult marches across the Sword Coast, uniting every race of monsters and men under the banner of a cryptic god they call the Absolute. Chaos strikes at Faerûn's foundations, and none may escape its talons. Not even you.

The grotesque nautiloid ship appears out of nowhere, blotting out the sun. Its writhing tentacles snatch you from where you stand. The mind flayers have come, imprisoning you on their ship, infecting you with their horrid parasite. You will become one of them.

By fate or fortune, you survive when the nautiloid crashes in the Sword Coast outlands. You set out for civilisation, desperate for a cure for the parasite festering in your brain, only to take centre stage in a conspiracy that runs as deep as the Nine Hells. New enemies await.

As for old foes... the shadows stir.
And all roads lead to the legendary city of Baldur's Gate.

Reúne a tu grupo y vuelve a los Reinos Olvidados en un relato de compañerismo y traición, sacrificio y supervivencia, además de la atracción de un poder absoluto.
Constituez votre groupe et retournez aux Royaumes Oubliés dans une histoire d'amitié, de trahison, de sacrifice et de survie, sur fond d'attrait du pouvoir absolu.
Stelle deine Gruppe zusammen und kehre in die Vergessenen Reiche zurück. Erlebe eine Geschichte von Freundschaft und Verrat, von Opfer und Überleben – und die Verlockung absoluter Macht.

拉瑞安工作室自豪地宣布，正基于PC和Google Stadia平台进行《博德之门3》的开发和发行工作，并与威世智的龙与地下城团队进行紧密合作。源起于目前D&D独有的机制规则与法术体系，《博德之门3》将成为这个传奇系列的正式全新篇章。

《博德之门3》将撼动RPG的上限，玩家在其中可以体验无与伦比的自由度，经历由该游戏带来的丰富故事线，同时作出高风险的决策，与独特的伙伴同游，并进行无数次难忘的战斗。这是拉瑞安工作室有史以来最大规模的作品，玩家可以和朋友们一同游玩，也能够以单人模式开始冒险。
召集你的团队，回到被遗忘的国度，开启一段记载着友谊与背叛、牺牲与生存、以及至上力量诱惑的传奇故事。

game.title: What Remains of Edith Finch
game.description:
What Remains of Edith Finch is a collection of short stories about a cursed family in Washington State.

Each story offers a chance to experience the life of a different family member with stories ranging from the early 1900s to the present day. The gameplay and tone of the stories are as varied as the family members themselves. The only constants are that each is played from a first-person perspective and that each story ends with that family member's death. It's a game about what it feels like to be humbled and astonished by the vast and unknowable world around us.

You'll follow Edith Finch as she explores the history of her family and tries to figure out why she's the last Finch left alive.

game.title: Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night
game.description:
Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night is a gothic horror action side-scrolling RPG set in 19th century England. A paranormal force has summoned a demon-infested castle, revealing crystal shards infused with tremendous magical power.

Play as Miriam, an orphan scarred by an alchemist's curse which slowly crystallizes her body. To save humanity, and herself in the process, Miriam must fight through the castle and defeat the summoner, Gebel.

Collect, craft and unlock a vast array of weapons, equipment and loot to defeat the countless minions and bosses of hell that await!

Bloodstained follows the protagonist Miriam, an orphan who is afflicted by an alchemist's curse, which is slowly turning her skin into crystal. To stop the curse, Miriam must explore a demon-filled castle and locate its summoner, Gebel, who has suffered from the curse for a long time.

localized_description.text:
Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night is a gothic horror action side-scrolling RPG set in 19th century England. A paranormal force has summoned a demon-infested castle, revealing crystal shards infused with tremendous magical power.

Play as Miriam, an orphan scarred by an alchemist's curse which slowly crystallizes her body. To save humanity, and herself in the process, Miriam must fight through the castle and defeat the summoner, Gebel.

Collect, craft and unlock a vast array of weapons, equipment and loot to defeat the countless minions and bosses of hell that await!

Bloodstained follows the protagonist Miriam, an orphan who is afflicted by an alchemist's curse, which is slowly turning her skin into crystal. To stop the curse, Miriam must explore a demon-filled castle and locate its summoner, Gebel, who has suffered from the curse for a long time.
游戏中玩家将扮演18岁的少女米莉安，她是曾被炼金术师收养、自幼身体上就被施加炼金术秘术的孤儿之一，因为秘术的影响而昏睡了10年，肉体跟着停止变化。因为昏睡所以没有受到地狱召唤仪式影响。苏醒后的米莉安，因为秘术的诅咒而导致肉体逐渐被魔力结晶侵蚀。为了存活下去，她必须深入昔日同伴吉贝尔所召唤出来、充满恶魔的城堡战斗。

CRIME BOSS  
 
  About the Game Bloodstained®︎: Ritual of the Night is the FULL game experience, an exploration-focused, side-scroller action RPG packing all of the best features you've come to know and love from the Metroidvania genre into a single, content-packed game. 
 
 Play as Miriam, an orphan scarred by an alchemist’s curse which slowly crystallizes her body. In order to save herself, and indeed, all of humanity, she must battle her way through a demon-infested castle summoned by Gebel, her old friend whose body and mind has become more crystal than flesh.
 
   WHAT'S IN THE GAME?  
 
  
 
 13 FREE DLCs via future content updates. “Speed Demon” Update containing Speed Run Mode, Boss Rush Mode and the Pure Miriam outfit available at launch!
 
  
 
 Addictingly tight and satisfying gameplay alongside a rich new story in the gothic dark fantasy style of Koji Igarashi, the celebrated godfather of "Igavania" games. 
 
  
 
 Story cut scenes and NPC interactions fully voice acted by a star-studded cast, including actors like David Hayter, Ray Chase and Erica Lindbeck to name just a few. (Seriously, we have a lot of voice acting star power in this game, it's kinda nuts...) 
 
 Three playable characters, two of which have yet to be revealed...
 
  
 
 Literally a metric ton of weapons and spells, which you can upgrade, level up and visually customize. 
 
  
 
 Beautiful 2.5D graphics: 3D models crafted with a lot of love and care on a 2D game environment. That means lots of cool tricks that "regular" 2D can't do...
 
   THE FUTURE  
 
 Expect a worryingly large amount of announcements and updates, everything from updating the look of this Steam page to the game in general. It's going to be one wild ride.

CRIME BOSS  
 
  Acerca del juego Bloodstained®︎ es un RPG de acción de desplazamiento lateral centrado en la exploración, y contiene los elementos más populares del género Metroidvania en un solo juego repleto de contenido.
 
 En él encarnas a Miriam, una huérfana trágicamente marcada por la maldición de un alquimista, que cristaliza lentamente su cuerpo. Para poder salvarse a sí misma y a toda la humanidad, debe recorrer luchando un castillo infestado de demonios invocados por Gebel, su viejo amigo cuyo cuerpo y mente ya son más cristal que carne.
 
 ¿QUÉ OFRECE EL JUEGO?
 
  
 
 Banda sonora a cargo de la veterana de la industria y de este género Michiru Yamane, e interpretada en directo por una orquesta al completo.
 
   
 
 Adictivas mecánicas de juego fluidas y satisfactorias con una fascinante historia nueva al estilo de fantasía gótica de Koji Igarashi, el célebre precursor del género "Igavania".
 
  
 
 Cinemáticas e interacciones con PNJ totalmente dobladas por un reparto de estrellas, como los actores David Hayter, Ray Chase y Erica Lindbeck, entre otros. (En serio, en este juego tenemos a un montón de estrellas del doblaje, es una locura...)
 
 Tres personajes jugables en total, dos de los cuales aún no hemos desvelado...
 
  
 
 Literalmente, una tonelada de armas y hechizos que puedes mejorar, subir de nivel y cuyo aspecto puedes personalizar.
 
  
 
 Hermosos gráficos en 2,5D: modelos en 3D diseñados a mano con mucho amor y cuidado, situados en un entorno en 2D. Con un montón de truquitos geniales que no permite el 2D "normal"...
 
 ¿CUÁNDO?
 
 Muy pronto desvelaremos las fechas de lanzamiento del juego.
 
 EL FUTURO
 
 Tendremos una cantidad inquietante de anuncios y actualizaciones, desde la nueva imagen de esta página de Steam hasta el juego en general. Nos esperan grandes emociones.

CRIME BOSS  
 
  À propos du jeu Bloodstained®︎: Ritual of the Night est l'expérience COMPLÈTE du jeu, un RPG d’action à défilement horizontal axé sur l’exploration et qui comprend toutes les fonctionnalités Metroidvania les plus populaires en un seul jeu bourré de contenu.
 
 Vous incarnez Miriam, une orpheline marquée par la malédiction d’un alchimiste qui cristallise lentement son corps. Pour se sauver, et sauver toute l’humanité, elle doit se frayer un chemin à travers un château infesté de démons invoqués par Gebel, son vieil ami, dont le corps et l’esprit se sont presque entièrement cristallisés.
 
   QUE CONTIENT LE JEU?   
  
  
 
 13 DLC GRATUITS via les futures mises à jour du contenu. Mise à jour «Speed Demon» contenant le mode Run, le mode Boss Rush et la tenue Pure Miriam disponible au lancement!
 
   
 
 Un gameplay précis et satisfaisant au fil d’une nouvelle histoire riche, dans le style fantastique gothique de Koji Igarashi, le célèbre parrain des jeux de type « Igavania ». 
  
  
 
 Des scènes et des interactions de NPC entièrement doublées par un casting de stars qui inclut des acteurs comme David Hayter, Ray Chase et Erica Lindbeck pour n’en nommer que quelques-uns. (Nous avons des tonnes de stars dans le jeu, c’est fou…) 
  
 Un total de trois personnages jouables, deux d’entre eux n’ayant pas encore été révélés…
 
  
 
 Une véritable tonne d’armes et de sorts que vous pouvez modifier, améliorer et personnaliser visuellement.
  
  
 
 De magnifiques graphismes en 2.5D : des modèles 3D conçus avec beaucoup d’amour et de soin dans un environnement de jeu en 2D. Cela promet des tonnes de trucs cool impossibles à faire avec la 2D « normale »…
 
   QUAND?  
 
 Nous allons très bientôt révéler la période de sortie du jeu.
 
   LE FUTUR  
 
 Attendez-vous à une quantité importante d’annonces et de mises à jour incluant les modifications de la page Steam et le jeu en lui-même. Une aventure de folie nous attend.

CRIME BOSS  
 
  Infos zum Spiel "Bloodstained®︎: Ritual of the Night" ist das GANZE Spielerlebnis, ein Sidescroller-Action-RPG, bei dem es viel zu entdecken gibt, mit all den besten Features, die ihr aus dem Metroidvania-Genre kennt und lieben gelernt habt, in einem einzigen Spiel, vollgepackt mit Inhalten.
 
 Du spielst als Miriam, einer Waise, deren Körper, nachdem sie von einem Alchemisten verflucht wurde, langsam zu Kristall wird. Um sich selbst, und damit die gesamte Menschheit, zu retten, muss sie sich durch ein Schloss kämpfen, das von Dämonen befallen wurde, die von ihrem alten Freund Gebel beschworen wurden, dessen Körper inzwischen mehr Kristall als Fleisch ist.
 
   WAS BIETET DAS SPIEL?  
 
  
 
 13 KOSTENLOSE DLCs über zukünftige Inhaltsaktualisierungen. "Speed Demon" -Update mit Speed Run-Modus, Boss Rush-Modus und dem Pure Miriam-Outfit zum Start!
 
   
 
 Dichtes und anspruchsvolles Gameplay mit Suchtfaktor und einer umfangreichen neuen Story im Gothic-Dark-Fantasy-Stil von Koji Igarashi, dem gefeierten Papst der „Igavania“-Spiele.
 
  
 
 Zwischenszenen und Interaktionen mit NSC werden von echten Starsprechern vertont, darunter Schauspieler wie David Hayter, Ray Chase oder Erica Lindbeck, um nur einige zu nennen. (Echt jetzt, unsere Sprecher sind eine absolute Starbesetzung, irgendwie total verrückt ...)
 
 Insgesamt drei spielbare Charaktere, wovon zwei bisher geheim sind ...
 
  
 
 Buchstäblich eine Tonne an Waffen und Zaubersprüchen, die ausgebaut, verbessert und visuell angepasst werden können.
 
  
 
 Wunderschöne 2,5-D-Grafiken: Liebevoll gestaltete 3-D-Modelle für eine 2-D-Spielwelt. Das bedeutet eine Menge cooler Tricks, die „normales“ 2-D nicht kann ...
 
   WANN?  
 
 Das Zeitfenster der Veröffentlichung wird bald verraten.
 
   DIE ZUKUNFT  
 
 Freu dich auf eine besorgniserregende Menge an Ankündigungen und Updates – was das Aussehen dieser Steam-Seite oder das Spiel im Allgemeinen betrifft. Das wird eine wilde Fahrt.

CRIME BOSS  
 
  Acerca do jogo Bloodstained®︎: Ritual of the Night is the FULL game experience, an exploration-focused, side-scroller action RPG packing all of the best features you've come to know and love from the Metroidvania genre into a single, content-packed game. 
 
 Play as Miriam, an orphan scarred by an alchemist’s curse which slowly crystallizes her body. In order to save herself, and indeed, all of humanity, she must battle her way through a demon-infested castle summoned by Gebel, her old friend whose body and mind has become more crystal than flesh.
 
   WHAT'S IN THE GAME?  
 
  
 
 13 FREE DLCs via future content updates. “Speed Demon” Update containing Speed Run Mode, Boss Rush Mode and the Pure Miriam outfit available at launch!
 
  
 
 Addictingly tight and satisfying gameplay alongside a rich new story in the gothic dark fantasy style of Koji Igarashi, the celebrated godfather of "Igavania" games. 
 
  
 
 Story cut scenes and NPC interactions fully voice acted by a star-studded cast, including actors like David Hayter, Ray Chase and Erica Lindbeck to name just a few. (Seriously, we have a lot of voice acting star power in this game, it's kinda nuts...) 
 
 Three playable characters, two of which have yet to be revealed...
 
  
 
 Literally a metric ton of weapons and spells, which you can upgrade, level up and visually customize. 
 
  
 
 Beautiful 2.5D graphics: 3D models crafted with a lot of love and care on a 2D game environment. That means lots of cool tricks that "regular" 2D can't do...
 
   THE FUTURE  
 
 Expect a worryingly large amount of announcements and updates, everything from updating the look of this Steam page to the game in general. It's going to be one wild ride.

CRIME BOSS  
 
  Om spillet Bloodstained®︎: Ritual of the Night is the FULL game experience, an exploration-focused, side-scroller action RPG packing all of the best features you've come to know and love from the Metroidvania genre into a single, content-packed game.

   WHAT'S IN THE GAME?

CRIME BOSS  
 
  Informazioni sul gioco Bloodstained®︎: Ritual of the Night è l'esperienza di gioco COMPLETA, un GdR a scorrimento laterale incentrato sull'esplorazione che racchiude tutti gli elementi più famosi e amati del genere Metroidvania in un unico videogioco pieno di contenuti.
 
 Vesti i panni di Miriam, un'orfana segnata dalla maledizione di un alchimista che lentamente cristallizza il suo corpo. Per salvare se stessa, e ovviamente tutta l'umanità, dovrà affrontare un castello infestato dai demoni evocati da Gebel, il suo vecchio amico il cui corpo e la cui mente si sono cristallizzati quasi del tutto.
 
   CHE COSA OFFRE IL GIOCO?   
 
  
 
 13 DLC GRATUITI tramite futuri aggiornamenti dei contenuti. Aggiornamento "Speed Demon" contenente Speed Run Mode, Boss Rush Mode e l'outfit Pure Miriam disponibili al momento del lancio!
 
   
 
 Azione intensa, coinvolgente e soddisfacente, accompagnata da una nuova ricca storia nello stile dark gotico fantasy di Koji Igarashi, celebre autore dei giochi "Igavania". 
 
  
 
 Filmati che raccontano la trama e interazioni vocali con i PNG interamente doppiate da una cast di attori famosi, tra cui David Hayter, Ray Chase ed Erica Lindbeck, per citarne qualcuno. (Cioè, abbiamo così tante star in questo gioco che è roba da matti...) 
 
 Un totale di tre personaggi giocabili, due ancora da rivelare...
 
  
 
 Praticamente una tonnellata di armi e magie da potenziare, far salire di livello e personalizzare esteticamente.
 
  
 
 Bellissima grafica 2,5D: modelli 3D realizzati con la massima cura in un ambiente 2D. Quindi un sacco di trucchi che un "normale" 2D non avrebbe...
 
   QUANDO?  
 
 Riveleremo molto presto la data di pubblicazione.
 
   IL FUTURO  
 
 Pubblicheremo una quantità preoccupante di annunci e notizie, dall'aggiornamento del look di questa pagina di Steam al gioco in generale. Sarà un'esperienza pazzesca.

game.brief:
Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night is a gothic horror action side-scrolling RPG set in 19th century England. A paranormal force has summoned a demon-infested castle, revealing crystal shards infused with tremendous magical power.

Play as Miriam, an orphan scarred by an alchemist's curse which slowly crystallizes her body. To save humanity, and herself in the process, Miriam must fight through the castle and defeat the summoner, Gebel.

Collect, craft and unlock a vast array of weapons, equipment and loot to defeat the countless minions and bosses of hell that await!

Bloodstained follows the protagonist Miriam, an orphan who is afflicted by an alchemist's curse, which is slowly turning her skin into crystal. To stop the curse, Miriam must explore a demon-filled castle and locate its summoner, Gebel, who has suffered from the curse for a long time.

game.title: Station to Station
game.description:
Station to Station is a minimalist & relaxing game about building railway connections. Grab your conductor’s hat and bring the voxel-art world to life through the magic of trains!

In Station to Station, your world starts small with a handful of rural structures. Place stations and create connections to foster growth and expansion. The more connections you build, the more your area will grow, bringing with it a vibrant, lush environment full of life and color!

"Station to Station" é um jogo minimalista e relaxante em que vais construir ligações ferroviárias. Pega no chapéu de maquinista e dá vida a um mundo em voxel art graças à magia dos comboios!

'Station to Station' ist ein minimalistisches & entspannendes Spiel rund um den Aufbau eines Eisenbahnnetzes. Nimm deine Schaffnermütze und lass die Voxel-Welt durch die Magie der Züge zum Leben erwachen!

Station to Station es un juego relajante y minimalista donde podrás construir conexiones ferroviarias. Ponte la gorra de maquinista y haz que el mundo del arte voxel cobre vida a través de la magia de los trenes.

Station to Station est un jeu minimaliste et relaxant qui consiste à construire des connexions ferroviaires. Mettez votre casquette d'artiste des chantiers et donnez vie à un monde en voxel grâce à la magie des trains !

"Station to Station" è un gioco rilassante e minimalista incentrato sulla costruzione di collegamenti ferroviari. Indossa il cappello da ferroviere e dai vita a un mondo in voxel art grazie alla magia dei treni!

game.title: The Boba Teashop
game.description: A cozy horror game where you own and manage a boba tea shop. Prepare boba teas, serve customers, and expand your menu to grow your business.

localized_description.text: A cozy horror game where you own and manage a boba tea shop. Prepare boba teas, serve customers, and expand your menu to grow your business.

珍珠奶茶店是一款温馨的恐怖游戏，你将拥有并经营一家珍珠奶茶店。制作奶茶、服务顾客，并不断扩展你的奶茶菜单。
  
  你将扮演莉莎，一个30多岁的女性，她厌倦了自己的公司生活，决定追逐梦想开一家珍珠奶茶店。
  
   
  
  作为一名珍珠奶茶店的老板，你将遇到各种各样的顾客，而你的工作就是面带微笑地接受顾客的订单。
  
   
  
  制作珍珠奶茶很简单。材料只有奶茶和珍珠，然后将杯子封上盖子，配上一根吸管来吸珍珠即可。
  
   
  
  但有时你会遇到一些苛刻的顾客，他们会提出特殊要求，或者让你的店里一团糟。
  
  作为一名自豪的奶茶店老板，这些都难不倒你。
  
   特点：   
   玩法：  简单的游戏循环，你从顾客那里接单，制作订单并交给他们。
  
   VHS 美学：  采用令人毛骨悚然的 VHS 滤镜，营造怀旧而诡异的氛围。
  
   故事：  了解关于 Risa 的故事，以及她作为奶茶店老板的发展历程。

The Boba Teashop  is a cozy horror game where you own and manage a boba tea shop.
  
  Prepare boba teas, serve customers, and expand your menu to attract more patrons.
   
   
  You play as Risa, a woman in her 30s who is tired of corporate life and has decided to chase her dream of opening a boba tea shop.
  
   
   
  As a boba tea shop owner, you will encounter a variety of customers. 
  
  Your job is to greet them with a smile and take their orders.
  
   
   
  Making boba tea is simple. The ingredients are just milk tea and boba. 
  
  Seal the cup with a lid and serve it with a straw for sipping and enjoying the boba pearls.
  
  
   
  But sometimes, you'll encounter demanding customers with special requests or those who leave a mess in your shop.
  
  As the proud owner of a boba tea shop, there's nothing you can't handle.
  
   
   
  While serving customers and managing your boba tea shop, you start seeing visions and hearing things.
  
  Is it all in your head, or is something haunting the place?
  
  This is psychological horror game that builds tension through eerie atmosphere, unsettling events, and moments of intense scare when you least expect them.
  
  Features:   Gameplay:  A simple yet engaging loop where you take orders from customers, prepare their drinks, and serve them with a smile.
  
   VHS Aesthetics:  Experience the game through a creepy VHS filter that adds a nostalgic and eerie atmosphere.
  
   Story:  Uncover Risa's journey and personal growth as she pursues her dream of becoming a successful boba tea shop owner.
  
  
  For content creators:  
  You are free to create content from the game and monetize the gameplay by any means. There are no other restrictions from my side when playing the game

"The Boba Teashop" est un jeu d'horreur où vous possédez et gérez un salon de thé à bulles. Préparez des thés à bulles, servez des clients et élargissez votre menu pour attirer davantage de clients.
  
  Vous incarnez Risa, une femme d'une trentaine d'années qui, fatiguée de la vie d'entreprise, a décidé de poursuivre son rêve : ouvrir un salon de thé à bulles.
  
   
  
  En tant que propriétaire d'un salon de thé à bulles, vous rencontrerez une variété de clients. Votre rôle est de les accueillir avec le sourire et de prendre leurs commandes.
  
   
  
  Préparer un thé à bulles est simple. Les ingrédients se résument au thé au lait et aux perles de tapioca. Scellez le gobelet avec un couvercle et servez-le avec une paille pour savourer les perles.
  
   
  
   Mais parfois, vous aurez affaire à des clients exigeants avec des demandes spéciales, ou à ceux qui laissent un désordre dans votre boutique. 
  
   En tant que fier propriétaire d'un salon de thé à bulles, rien ne vous fait peur. 
  
  
  Fonctionnalités :  
   Gameplay  : Une boucle de jeu simple mais captivante où vous prenez les commandes des clients, préparez leurs boissons et les servez avec le sourire.
  
   Esthétique VHS  : Vivez le jeu à travers un filtre VHS inquiétant qui ajoute une ambiance nostalgique et mystérieuse.
  
   Histoire  : Découvrez le parcours et l'évolution personnelle de Risa, qui réalise son rêve de devenir une propriétaire de salon de thé à bulles à succès.

Der Boba-Teeladen  ist ein Horrorspiel, in dem du einen Boba-Teeladen besitzt und leitest. Bereite Boba-Tees zu, bediene Kunden und erweitere dein Menü, um mehr Gäste anzulocken.
  
  Du spielst Risa, eine Frau in ihren 30ern, die des Konzernlebens überdrüssig ist und beschlossen hat, ihren Traum zu verfolgen, einen Boba-Teeladen zu eröffnen.
  
   
  
  Als Besitzer eines Boba-Teeladens wirst du auf eine Vielzahl von Kunden treffen. Deine Aufgabe ist es, sie mit einem Lächeln zu begrüßen und ihre Bestellungen aufzunehmen.
  
   
  
  Boba-Tee zuzubereiten ist einfach. Die Zutaten sind nur Milchtee und Boba. Verschließe den Becher mit einem Deckel und serviere ihn mit einem Strohhalm, damit die Boba-Perlen genossen werden können.
  
   
  
  Doch manchmal wirst du auf anspruchsvolle Kunden mit speziellen Wünschen stoßen oder solche, die ein Chaos in deinem Laden hinterlassen.
  
  Als stolzer Besitzer eines Boba-Teeladens gibt es jedoch nichts, was du nicht bewältigen kannst.
  
  
   Features: 
  
   Gameplay:  Ein einfaches, aber fesselndes Spielprinzip, bei dem du Bestellungen von Kunden aufnimmst, ihre Getränke zubereitest und sie mit einem Lächeln servierst.
  
   VHS-Ästhetik:  Erlebe das Spiel durch einen gruseligen VHS-Filter, der eine nostalgische und unheimliche Atmosphäre schafft.
  
   Story:  Entdecke Risas Reise und ihr persönliches Wachstum, während sie ihren Traum verfolgt, eine erfolgreiche Besitzerin eines Boba-Teeladens zu werden.

タピるお茶屋は、タピるお茶屋を経営しながら管理する、ほのぼのとしたホラーゲームです。タピオカティーを作り、お客さんに提供し、メニューを広げていきましょう。
  
  あなたはリサとしてプレイします。30代の彼女は企業での生活に疲れ、夢だったタピるお茶屋を開くことを決意しました。
  
   
  
  タピるお茶屋の店主として、さまざまなお客さんと出会い、笑顔で接客し注文を受けるのがあなたの仕事です。
  
   
  
  タピオカミルクティーを作るのは簡単です。材料はミルクティーとタピオカだけで、カップに蓋をしてストローを添えるだけで完成します。
  
   
  
  しかし、時には特別なリクエストをする要求の多いお客様や、店内を散らかしてしまうお客様に出会うこともあります。
  
  それでも、タピるお茶屋の誇り高き店主として、どんなことも乗り越えられるはずです。
  
   特徴: 
  
   ゲームプレイ:  お客様から注文を受け、注文を作り、それを提供するというシンプルなゲームループ。
  
   VHSの美学:  懐かしく不気味な雰囲気を演出するVHSフィルター。
  
   ストーリー:  リサの物語と、タピるお茶屋の店主としての成長を知ることができます。
  
  
  
   コンテンツ制作者の皆さまへ： 
  
  本ゲームのプレイ映像を使用したコンテンツの制作および収益化はご自由に行っていただけます。ゲームのプレイに関して、こちらから特別な制限は一切ありません。

"The Boba Teashop" est un jeu d'horreur où vous possédez et gérez un salon de thé à bulles. Préparez des thés à bulles, servez des clients et élargissez votre menu pour attirer davantage de clients.
  
  Vous incarnez Risa, une femme d'une trentaine d'années qui, fatiguée de la vie d'entreprise, a décidé de poursuivre son rêve : ouvrir un salon de thé à bulles.
  
     
  
  En tant que propriétaire d'un salon de thé à bulles, vous rencontrerez une variété de clients. Votre rôle est de les accueillir avec le sourire et de prendre leurs commandes.
  
     
  
  Préparer un thé à bulles est simple. Les ingrédients se résument au thé au lait et aux perles de tapioca. Scellez le gobelet avec un couvercle et servez-le avec une paille pour savourer les perles.
  
     
  
   Mais parfois, vous aurez affaire à des clients exigeants avec des demandes spéciales, ou à ceux qui laissent un désordre dans votre boutique. 
  
   En tant que fier propriétaire d'un salon de thé à bulles, rien ne vous fait peur. 
  
  
  Fonctionnalités :  
   Gameplay  : Une boucle de jeu simple mais captivante où vous prenez les commandes des clients, préparez leurs boissons et les servez avec le sourire.
  
   Esthétique VHS  : Vivez le jeu à travers un filtre VHS inquiétant qui ajoute une ambiance nostalgique et mystérieuse.
  
   Histoire  : Découvrez le parcours et l'évolution personnelle de Risa, qui réalise son rêve de devenir une propriétaire de salon de thé à bulles à succès.

Der Boba-Teeladen  ist ein Horrorspiel, in dem du einen Boba-Teeladen besitzt und leitest. Bereite Boba-Tees zu, bediene Kunden und erweitere dein Menü, um mehr Gäste anzulocken.
  
  Du spielst Risa, eine Frau in ihren 30ern, die des Konzernlebens überdrüssig ist und beschlossen hat, ihren Traum zu verfolgen, einen Boba-Teeladen zu eröffnen.
  
     
  
  Als Besitzer eines Boba-Teeladens wirst du auf eine Vielzahl von Kunden treffen. Deine Aufgabe ist es, sie mit einem Lächeln zu begrüßen und ihre Bestellungen aufzunehmen.
  
     
  
  Boba-Tee zuzubereiten ist einfach. Die Zutaten sind nur Milchtee und Boba. Verschließe den Becher mit einem Deckel und serviere ihn mit einem Strohhalm, damit die Boba-Perlen genossen werden können.
  
     
  
  Doch manchmal wirst du auf anspruchsvolle Kunden mit speziellen Wünschen stoßen oder solche, die ein Chaos in deinem Laden hinterlassen.
  
  Als stolzer Besitzer eines Boba-Teeladens gibt es jedoch nichts, was du nicht bewältigen kannst.
  
  
   Features: 
  
   Gameplay:  Ein einfaches, aber fesselndes Spielprinzip, bei dem du Bestellungen von Kunden aufnimmst, ihre Getränke zubereitest und sie mit einem Lächeln servierst.
  
   VHS-Ästhetik:  Erlebe das Spiel durch einen gruseligen VHS-Filter, der eine nostalgische und unheimliche Atmosphäre schafft.
  
   Story:  Entdecke Risas Reise und ihr persönliches Wachstum, während sie ihren Traum verfolgt, eine erfolgreiche Besitzerin eines Boba-Teeladens zu werden.

The Boba Teashop  is a cozy horror game where you own and manage a boba tea shop.
  
  Prepare boba teas, serve customers, and expand your menu to attract more patrons.
     
     
  You play as Risa, a woman in her 30s who is tired of corporate life and has decided to chase her dream of opening a boba tea shop.
  
     
     
  As a boba tea shop owner, you will encounter a variety of customers. 
  
  Your job is to greet them with a smile and take their orders.
  
     
     
  Making boba tea is simple. The ingredients are just milk tea and boba. 
  
  Seal the cup with a lid and serve it with a straw for sipping and enjoying the boba pearls.
  
  
     
  But sometimes, you'll encounter demanding customers with special requests or those who leave a mess in your shop.
  
  As the proud owner of a boba tea shop, there's nothing you can't handle.
  
     
     
  While serving customers and managing your boba tea shop, you start seeing visions and hearing things.
  
  Is it all in your head, or is something haunting the place?
  
  This is psychological horror game that builds tension through eerie atmosphere, unsettling events, and moments of intense scare when you least expect them.
  
  Features:   Gameplay:  A simple yet engaging loop where you take orders from customers, prepare their drinks, and serve them with a smile.
  
   VHS Aesthetics:  Experience the game through a creepy VHS filter that adds a nostalgic and eerie atmosphere.
  
   Story:  Uncover Risa's journey and personal growth as she pursues her dream of becoming a successful boba tea shop owner.
  
  
  For content creators:  
  You are free to create content from the game and monetize the gameplay by any means. There are no other restrictions from my side when playing the game

game.brief: A cozy horror game where you own and manage a boba tea shop. Prepare boba teas, serve customers, and expand your menu to grow your business.

game.title: Not For Broadcast
game.description:
Feature List:  
   Deep and meaningful gameplay decisions
   14 distinct endings
   Darkly-comic branching narrative
   Over 42 hours of full motion video (FMV) - a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS™ achievement
   Bursting with musical numbers  
 Take control of the National Nightly News.  With the nation's eyes fixed on your choices, it’s up to you to decide what gets broadcast. Choose the shots, censor any “troublesome” content, and steer the narrative as your country tumbles into totalitarianism. No pressure, right?
 
    
   Hand-pick the Headlines  
  Not For Broadcast  drops you into the heart of a darkly-comedic tale of televised chaos, where your every decision helps shape the fate of a nation. From ego-fueled celebrities to deceptive politicians and enigmatic advertisers - you control the public’s perception.  As long as you can hold the audience’s fickle attention, it’ll be your choice whether to toe the party line or hype up the scandal.
 
 Will you make that sportsman seem like a national treasure, or an alcoholic disgrace?  What about those scientists trapped in Dante’s Taint?  Or that new boss at multinational giant Rymmington-Svist who seems to live a double life?  Most importantly, will you help the brand-new government look benevolent, or is there something untoward about them that the public need to see?
 
 The power is in your hands to change everything, but you’ll have to decide quickly - the news goes out live!
 
    
   Craft the Narrative (and the Nation's Fate)  
 You are in the driving seat of a multi-level tale about both an entire country and a single family.  Being the architect of the nation’s future is a challenge, to be sure, but so is trying to hold your household together through the dark times.
 
    
 
 With multiple branching narratives, every choice you make resonates into the future. Will you help your spouse’s sibling flee the country... even if it involves breaking the law?  Who are ‘Disrupt’ -  concerned citizens or something more revolutionary?  And how do you feel about your son spending more and more time with them?
 
 And then there’s Grandma... Can you afford her life-saving treatment, or should you and your spouse be taking advantage of one of the Government’s brand-new Transition Centres?  After all, granny, there’s nothing more noble than unburdening your children!
 
    
 
 And then there’s your broadcast room - when it’s not overheating, it seems to be trying to electrocute you.  Keep the plates spinning as best you can, but remember, whether it’s a newsreader who just won’t take it any more, naked streakers at the Sportsboard Final, or the ever growing threat of nuclear war... this show MUST go on.
   Cue the Ads  
 Select your ads carefully to mould the public’s opinion.  Why not choose to show only adverts for the companies you have shares in?  Maybe that extra cash will help with the difficult decisions at home.  Or maybe you’ll be selling dangerous toys to the nation’s children…
 
 With more than 50 hilarious ads to choose from there’s never a dull moment - even during the breaks.  
 
    
   Endure the Unthinkable and Laugh in the Face of Adversity  
 There will be smiles, there will be tears, even as the world falls apart around your ears. So grit your teeth, close your eyes and keep those cameras rolling - the people are counting on you.  Long live the National Nightly News.
